MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE t.conference = 'Western' RETURN t.team_name, AVG(s.goals) AS avg_goals ORDER BY avg_goals DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, t, pf.salary AS player_salary MATCH (p2:PLAYER)-[pf2:PLAYS_FOR]->(t) WITH t, AVG(pf2.salary) AS avg_team_salary MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.salary > avg_team_salary RETURN p.full_name, t.team_name, pf.salary
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH p, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary RETURN p.full_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary RETURN t.team_name, t.city, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_toi, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN p.full_name, total_toi ORDER BY total_toi DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN t.team_name, AVG(c.salary) AS avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM) WHERE c.experience_years > 10 AND t.conference = 'Western' RETURN c.full_name, t.team_name
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary, SUM(pf.signing_bonus) AS total_bonus ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[c:COVERED_BY]->(:CONTRACT) WHERE t.conference = 'Eastern' WITH t, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary RETURN t.team_name, total_salary
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) RETURN p.full_name, COUNT(g) AS games_played ORDER BY games_played DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN t.team_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN l.league_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_time_on_ice ORDER BY total_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.shooting_hand, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue, COUNT(g) AS total_games, SUM(g.attendance) AS total_attendance, AVG(g.attendance) AS avg_attendance ORDER BY total_attendance DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)-[:COMPETES_IN]->(l:LEAGUE), (t)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) RETURN t.team_name, l.league_name, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS games_count
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH c, AVG(p.jersey_number) AS avg_salary RETURN c.full_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count, SUM(i.expected_recovery_days) AS total_recovery_days WHERE injury_count > 1 AND total_recovery_days > 30 RETURN p.full_name, total_recovery_days
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD {injury_type: 'Knee'}), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {venue: 'Madison Square Garden'})-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Postponed'}), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.signing_bonus > 30000 RETURN p.position, AVG(c.salary) AS average_salary

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals MATCH (p)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH) WITH p, total_goals, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS coach_count WHERE coach_count >= 3 AND total_goals > 50 RETURN p.full_name, total_goals
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Postponed'}) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS total_games RETURN p.full_name, total_games ORDER BY total_games DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (g:GAME) WHERE g.period_scores IS NOT NULL WITH g, [score IN split(g.period_scores, ',') | toInteger(trim(score))] AS scores WHERE scores[0] - scores[1] >= 3 RETURN g.game_date, g.venue, (scores[0] - scores[1]) AS score_difference
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 RETURN t.team_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC

MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[cb:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.start_date > date('2020-01-01') RETURN l.league_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WHERE i.expected_recovery_days > 30 RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.expected_recovery_days
MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN c.full_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.salary > 5000000 WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types WHERE injury_types > 1 RETURN p.full_name, injury_types
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue AS arena, COUNT(g) AS games_played ORDER BY games_played DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals, SUM(s.assists) AS total_assists, (SUM(s.goals) + SUM(s.assists)) AS total_points ORDER BY total_points DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WHERE pf.salary > 5000000 RETURN t.team_name, COUNT(p) AS high_earners

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, g, s WHERE s.goals = 0 WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_without_goals MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g2:GAME) WITH p, games_without_goals, COUNT(g2) AS total_games WHERE games_without_goals = total_games RETURN p.full_name, games_without_goals

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH t, p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE games_played >= 20 RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE injury_types > 1 AND games_played >= 20 RETURN p.full_name, injury_types, games_played

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.penalties) AS avg_penalties WHERE games_played > 50 RETURN t.team_name, avg_penalties ORDER BY avg_penalties DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.penalties) AS total_penalties WHERE games_played > 20 RETURN t.team_name, total_penalties ORDER BY total_penalties DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_time_on_ice ORDER BY total_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 10 RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, g.game_date
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(con:CONTRACT) WITH c, AVG(con.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE avg_salary > 5000000 RETURN c.full_name, avg_salary
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 RETURN t.team_name, MAX(g.attendance) AS max_attendance

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types, SUM(i.expected_recovery_days) AS total_recovery_days WHERE injury_types >= 2 AND total_recovery_days > 30 RETURN p.full_name, total_recovery_days

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 5 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, SUM(s.penalties) AS total_penalties, COUNT(g) AS games_participated ORDER BY total_penalties DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN p.full_name, total_penalties, games_participated

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH g, AVG(s.plus_minus) AS avg_plus_minus MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus > avg_plus_minus RETURN p.full_name, g.game_date, s.plus_minus

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE p.shooting_hand IS NOT NULL AND p.position IS NOT NULL RETURN p.shooting_hand, p.position, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue AS arena_name, COUNT(g.GAME_id) AS total_games ORDER BY total_games DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE (c.end_date IS NULL OR c.end_date > date()) AND pf.contract_start_date <= date('2023-12-31') AND pf.contract_end_date >= date('2023-01-01') RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH), (t)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'}) RETURN t.team_name, c.full_name, COUNT(g) AS total_games
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.expected_recovery_days ORDER BY i.expected_recovery_days DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary WHERE total_salary > 50000000 RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_time_on_ice ORDER BY total_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 20000 RETURN DISTINCT t.team_name, g.game_date, g.venue

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.assists) AS total_assists WHERE games_played >= 15 RETURN p.full_name, total_assists ORDER BY total_assists DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN t.team_name, COUNT(i) AS total_injuries, AVG(i.expected_recovery_days) AS avg_recovery_time ORDER BY total_injuries DESC

MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[ci:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH l, t, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary MATCH (t)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH l, t, total_salary, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE games_played >= 30 RETURN l.league_name, t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS players_coached, AVG(s.plus_minus) AS avg_plus_minus WHERE players_coached >= 5 RETURN c.full_name, avg_plus_minus ORDER BY avg_plus_minus DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH t, p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary WHERE injury_count > 2 RETURN t.team_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS injured_players, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH l, COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS team_count, variance(c.salary) AS salary_variance WHERE team_count > 5 RETURN l.league_name, salary_variance ORDER BY salary_variance DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'})-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN c.full_name, t.team_name, AVG(s.goals) AS avg_goals ORDER BY avg_goals DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH c, t, variance(s.plus_minus) AS plus_minus_variance WHERE plus_minus_variance > 5 RETURN c.full_name, plus_minus_variance ORDER BY plus_minus_variance DESC
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'Approved' AND d.DateOfBirth < date('1990-01-01') RETURN SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity

MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Completed' AND db.CollectionDate > datetime('2022-01-01T00:00:00') RETURN AVG(db.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity
MATCH (mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial), (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp) WHERE bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN mp.Type AS ProcedureType, h.Name AS HospitalName
MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'AB-' RETURN DISTINCT d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor {HealthStatus: 'Healthy'}) RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, h.Location AS HospitalLocation
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, comp.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'Approved' AND d.DateOfBirth > date('1980-01-01') RETURN SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rcv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, c.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantityDonated
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r) WHERE r.HealthCondition = 'Critical' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' AND r.RequiredQuantity > 10 RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Date AS ProcedureDate
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.CollectionDate < bm.ExpirationDate RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate
MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' AND bm.Status = 'Unsafe' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS QuarantinedBatchCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCount WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, d.DateOfBirth AS DateOfBirth, DonationCount ORDER BY DonationCount DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCount WHERE DonationCount > 10 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rcv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r) WITH r, COUNT(bm) AS CompatibleCount RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, CompatibleCount ORDER BY CompatibleCount DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WITH c.DonorBloodType AS DonorBloodType, c.RecipientBloodType AS RecipientBloodType, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgQuantity RETURN DonorBloodType, RecipientBloodType, AvgQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Successful'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, MIN(perf.Date) AS EarliestProcedureDate, MAX(perf.Date) AS LatestProcedureDate

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' AND r.HealthCondition = 'Critical' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.Quantity > 50 AND bm.ExpirationDate > datetime() RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate, db.Quantity AS BatchQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[don:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND don.Quantity > 10 RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, don.DonationDate AS DonationDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Reserved' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(DISTINCT mp) AS DistinctProcedureCount ORDER BY DistinctProcedureCount DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, SUM(r.RequiredQuantity) AS TotalQuantityUsed RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, TotalQuantityUsed ORDER BY TotalQuantityUsed DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[don:Donates]-(d:Donor) WITH r, COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DonorCount, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalReceivedQuantity WHERE DonorCount > 1 RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, DonorCount, TotalReceivedQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.ExpirationDate > datetime() RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, bm.Type AS MaterialType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS Outcome

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Receives]-(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND bm.Type = 'Platelets' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus, perf.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome, perf.Date AS ProcedureDate

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor)-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement) WHERE rr.ComplianceStatus = 'Compliant' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, d.HealthStatus AS DonorHealthStatus

MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, bm.CollectionDate AS CollectionDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate, d.Name AS DonorName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) WHERE p.Outcome = 'Successful' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS SuccessfulProcedures, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus ORDER BY SuccessfulProcedures DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS ExpiredDonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity WHERE ExpiredDonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, ExpiredDonationCount, AverageQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount, AVG(r.RequiredQuantity) AS AvgRequiredQuantity WHERE ProcedureCount > 10 RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, ProcedureCount, AvgRequiredQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH r, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Successful'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Plasma' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS SuccessfulProceduresCount ORDER BY SuccessfulProceduresCount DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DonorCount

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r) WITH r, COUNT(bm) AS CompatibleMaterialCount RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType, CompatibleMaterialCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, bm.Type AS MaterialType, d.HealthStatus AS HealthStatus, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, HealthStatus, MaterialType, TotalQuantity ORDER BY DonorName, MaterialType

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB-'}) RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName, comp.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS QuarantinedBatchCount MATCH (d)-[:Donates]->(bm2:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Requires]-(mp:MedicalProcedure)<-[:Performs]-(h:Hospital) WHERE h.AccreditationStatus = 'Provisionally Accredited' WITH d, QuarantinedBatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT mp) AS ProvisionallyAccreditedProcedures RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, QuarantinedBatchCount, ProvisionallyAccreditedProcedures

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCountToONegative RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, DonationCountToONegative, d.HealthStatus AS HealthStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.Type = 'Plasma' WITH d, COUNT(don) AS DonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgQuantity WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AvgQuantity AS AverageDonationQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' AND bm.Type = 'Plasma' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate, db.Quantity AS BatchQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB+'}) WITH d MATCH (d)-[:Donates]->(bm2:BiologicalMaterial)-[:Receives]->(r2:Recipient {HealthCondition: 'Critical'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS UniqueDonorCount

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS Outcome, SUM(req.RequiredQuantity) AS TotalRequiredQuantity RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, ProcedureType, Outcome, TotalRequiredQuantity ORDER BY HospitalName, ProcedureType

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE bm.Type = 'Plasma' AND r.Allergies IS NOT NULL RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName, r.Allergies AS RecipientAllergies
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[recv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, SUM(recv.Quantity) AS TotalQuantityReceived ORDER BY TotalQuantityReceived DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, bm.CollectionDate AS CollectionDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate

MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH bm, COUNT(db) AS BatchCount, MAX(bm.ExpirationDate) AS LatestExpiration RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, BatchCount, LatestExpiration ORDER BY BatchCount DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE perf.Outcome = 'Successful' AND bm.Status = 'Expired' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ExpiredMaterialProcedureCount
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, SUM(bm.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 3 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AVG(TotalQuantity) AS AverageQuantityPerBatch
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) WHERE mp.Outcome = 'Successful' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, p.Date AS ProcedureDate ORDER BY p.Date DESC

MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]-(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' WITH db, SUM(btb.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(don) AS DonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgDonationQuantity WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AvgDonationQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH h, AVG(db.Quantity) AS AvgBatchQuantity, COUNT(mp) AS TotalProcedures RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, AvgBatchQuantity, TotalProcedures

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT bm.Type) AS DistinctMaterialTypes, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE DistinctMaterialTypes >= 2 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, DistinctMaterialTypes, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, p.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Minor Condition' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Failed'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' AND bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Expired' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ExpiredMaterialProcedures, MIN(mp.Date) AS EarliestProcedureDate, MAX(mp.Date) AS LatestProcedureDate

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgDonationQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 2 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, BatchCount, AvgDonationQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 3 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE bm.Type <> r.BloodType RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, r.BloodType AS RecipientBloodType

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) RETURN d.BloodType AS DonorBloodType, c.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity ORDER BY DonorBloodType, CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB+'}) RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, r.Name AS RecipientName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, req.RequiredQuantity AS RequiredQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < rec.ReceiptDate RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor)-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, bm.Type AS MaterialType, rr.ComplianceStatus AS DonorComplianceStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch), (mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm), (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp) WHERE h.Location = 'Whitneyville' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor {HealthStatus: 'Healthy'})-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement {ComplianceStatus: 'Compliant'}) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, d.ConsentStatus AS DonorConsentStatus
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2.country) AS country_count RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, country_count
MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'}) WHERE a.balance > 100000 RETURN fp.name, COUNT(t) AS failed_transaction_count

MATCH (t:Transaction)<-[:TransactsWith]-(a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) RETURN t.reference_number AS transaction_reference, re.name AS regulatory_entity_name
MATCH (a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'medium'})-[:AssessesRisk]->(fp:FinancialProduct {product_type: 'investment'}) RETURN SUM(a.balance) AS total_balance

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies, count(ra) AS risk_count WHERE size(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name, currencies, risk_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {transaction_type: 'withdrawal'}) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 500 RETURN c.name, a.account_number, t.amount
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, COUNT(i2) AS international_relationships_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS account_currencies WHERE size(account_currencies) > 1 MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WITH c, account_currencies, collect(DISTINCT t.currency) AS transaction_currencies WHERE size(transaction_currencies) >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, account_currencies

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'critical'}) RETURN fp.name AS product_name, AVG(fp.current_balance_impact) AS average_balance_impact

MATCH (t:Transaction)<-[:TransactsWith]-(a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) RETURN t.reference_number AS transaction_reference, count(re) AS report_count

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.amount > 10000 AND t.status = 'completed' RETURN fp.name AS product_name, fp.product_type AS product_type, COUNT(t) AS high_value_transaction_count
MATCH (i:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(other:Institution) WITH i, COLLECT(DISTINCT other.country) AS countries WHERE SIZE(countries) > 2 RETURN i.name AS institution_name, countries

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 1000 RETURN fp.name AS product_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS account_count, COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS transaction_count

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2) AS international_correspondent_count WHERE international_correspondent_count > 2 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, international_correspondent_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra1:RiskAssessment), (c)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra2:RiskAssessment) WITH c, AVG(ra1.flags_raised) AS avg_flags_from_accounts, AVG(ra2.flags_raised) AS avg_flags_from_transactions RETURN c.name, (avg_flags_from_accounts + avg_flags_from_transactions) / 2 AS average_flags_raised
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN i1.name AS institution1, i2.name AS institution2, c.relationship_start AS relationship_start ORDER BY c.relationship_start

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 5000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, a.account_number AS account_number, t.reference_number AS transaction_reference
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, count(i2) AS international_correspondent_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct {risk_profile: 'high'}), (a)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'})-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN c.name, sum(t.amount) AS total_failed_amount
MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'critical'}) RETURN fp.name, AVG(ra.flags_raised) AS average_flags_raised

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 50000 WITH fp, a, COLLECT(DISTINCT t.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) >= 2 RETURN fp.name AS product_name, fp.product_type AS product_type, COUNT(DISTINCT currencies) AS distinct_currency_count

MATCH (a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'})-[:RecordedIn]->(al:AuditLog) RETURN al.details AS audit_log_details, a.account_number AS account_number

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies, count(DISTINCT a) AS account_count WHERE account_count > 1 MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a2:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) WITH c, currencies, count(DISTINCT re) AS counterparty_count WHERE counterparty_count >= 3 RETURN c.name, currencies
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name, currencies
MATCH (c:Customer {risk_rating: 'medium'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WHERE a.balance > 5000 RETURN fp.name, AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(:RegulatoryEntity) RETURN a.account_number, a.currency, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount, AVG(t.amount) AS average_amount

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(i2) AS same_country_relationships RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, same_country_relationships

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, count(i2) AS cross_border_relationships RETURN i1.name, cross_border_relationships ORDER BY cross_border_relationships DESC

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity)<-[:ReportsTo]-(t:Transaction {status: 'completed'}) WITH re, count(t) AS completed_transactions MATCH (re)<-[:ReportsTo]-(a:Account {status: 'active'}) WITH re, completed_transactions, count(a) AS active_accounts RETURN re.name AS regulatory_entity_name, completed_transactions, active_accounts

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) WITH c, COUNT(ra) AS high_risk_count RETURN c.name, high_risk_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) WHERE re.last_reported_date > date('2023-01-01') RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) RETURN c.name, count(ra) AS high_risk_assessments
MATCH (c:Customer {kyc_status: 'verified'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {jurisdiction: 'EU'}) RETURN DISTINCT c.name, c.Customer_id
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN DISTINCT i1.name, i1.country
MATCH (c:Customer {customer_type: 'corporate'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct {risk_profile: 'high'}) RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, count(i2) AS relationship_count WHERE relationship_count > 1 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, relationship_count
MATCH (t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) RETURN t.amount AS transaction_amount, t.currency AS transaction_currency, ra.assessment_date AS risk_assessment_timestamp
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution1, i2.name AS institution2, i1.country
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.status = 'completed' AND a.balance > 5000 RETURN c.Customer_id, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) WHERE a.balance > 10000 RETURN DISTINCT c.name, c.Customer_id, a.Account_id, a.balance

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WITH c, COUNT(ra) AS risk_count, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_transaction_amount WHERE risk_count > 2 RETURN c.name, c.Customer_id, risk_count, avg_transaction_amount

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity {jurisdiction: 'EU'})<-[:ReportsTo]-(a:Account) WITH re, count(DISTINCT a) AS account_count MATCH (re)<-[:ReportsTo]-(t:Transaction) WITH re, account_count, count(DISTINCT t) AS transaction_count WHERE account_count > 10 RETURN re, account_count, transaction_count

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution), (i1)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i3:Institution) WHERE i2.Institution_id <> i3.Institution_id AND i1.country <> i2.country AND i1.country <> i3.country RETURN DISTINCT i1.name, i1.country
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i2:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i3:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country OR i1.country = i3.country RETURN DISTINCT i1

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2.country) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 3 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, country_count ORDER BY country_count DESC

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity)<-[:ReportsTo]-(n) WHERE n:Account OR n:Transaction WITH re, COUNT(n) AS total_reports WHERE total_reports > 100 RETURN re.name AS regulatory_entity_name, total_reports ORDER BY total_reports DESC
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, currencies
MATCH (t:Transaction)-[:RecordedIn]->(al:AuditLog) WHERE t.status = 'failed' RETURN al.details AS audit_details, t.amount AS transaction_amount

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WHERE ra.risk_level = 'high' RETURN c.name AS customer_name, a.Account_id AS account_id, ra.assessment_date AS assessment_date

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.currency = 'USD' AND t.status = 'completed' RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN i1.name AS institution1_name, i2.name AS institution2_name, c.relationship_start AS relationship_start_date
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, count(ra) AS risk_assessment_count ORDER BY risk_assessment_count DESC
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, count(i2) AS relationship_count WHERE relationship_count > 1 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, relationship_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WHERE fp.risk_profile = 'high' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) WHERE re.compliance_status = 'non_compliant' RETURN sum(a.balance) AS total_balance

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND a.currency = 'USD' AND t.status = 'failed' RETURN c.name, a.account_number, t.reference_number
MATCH (i:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(:Institution) WHERE c.relationship_status = 'active' RETURN i.name, COUNT(c) AS correspondent_count

MATCH (a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WITH a, COUNT(fp) AS product_count WHERE product_count > 1 MATCH (a)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) RETURN a.account_number, product_count, collect(fp.name) AS product_names

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE size(currencies) > 1 UNWIND currencies AS currency MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a2:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a2.currency = currency RETURN c, currencies

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 10 AND avg_time_on_ice > 20 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH) WITH t, MAX(c.experience_years) AS max_experience WHERE max_experience <= 10 RETURN t.team_name, max_experience

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, g, s WHERE s.goals > 0 WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_with_goals MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g2:GAME) WITH p, games_with_goals, COUNT(g2) AS total_games WHERE games_with_goals = total_games RETURN p.full_name, games_with_goals
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, AVG(p.jersey_number) AS avg_salary RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {venue: 'Staples Center'}) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types WHERE injury_types > 1 RETURN p.full_name, injury_types
MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM) WHERE t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN c.full_name, c.experience_years, t.team_name ORDER BY c.experience_years DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 AND s.goals > 2 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, t, pf.salary AS player_salary, t.division AS division MATCH (p)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH division, p, player_salary, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE games_played >= 50 RETURN division, AVG(player_salary) AS avg_salary
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN p.full_name, COUNT(i) AS injury_count ORDER BY injury_count DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[r:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME), (p)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE games_played >= 50 RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH t, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_toi WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN p.full_name, total_toi ORDER BY total_toi DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)-[:COMPETES_IN]->(l:LEAGUE) WHERE l.league_name = 'National Hockey League' RETURN c.full_name, c.experience_years ORDER BY c.experience_years DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus > 3 RETURN p.full_name, g.game_date, s.plus_minus ORDER BY s.plus_minus DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WHERE t.conference = 'Western' RETURN t.team_name, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight ORDER BY avg_weight DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH g, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals WHERE total_goals > 10 RETURN g.game_date, g.venue, total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.start_date > date('2020-01-01') RETURN t.team_name, AVG(c.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count WHERE injury_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH p, injury_count, COUNT(g) AS games_count WHERE games_count >= 15 RETURN p.full_name, injury_count

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[cb:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE cb.contract_date >= i.injury_date AND (i.status = 'Active' OR i.status = 'Reported') RETURN p.full_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary_during_injury

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN t.team_name, variance(s.plus_minus) AS performance_variance ORDER BY performance_variance DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)-[:COMPETES_IN]->(l:LEAGUE) RETURN c.full_name, COUNT(DISTINCT l) AS leagues_coached_in ORDER BY leagues_coached_in DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, MAX(s.goals) AS max_goals_in_single_game ORDER BY max_goals_in_single_game DESC

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'})-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 4 RETURN c.full_name, COUNT(g) AS games_count

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH t, p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, pf.salary AS salary WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN t.team_name, AVG(salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(g.attendance) AS total_attendance ORDER BY total_attendance DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pp:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 20 MATCH (p)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN p.full_name, t.team_name, avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[r:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS total_games, SUM(CASE WHEN s.goals > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS games_with_goals WHERE games_with_goals > total_games * 0.5 RETURN p.full_name, total_games, games_with_goals
MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN c.full_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_player_salary ORDER BY avg_player_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, p, MAX(s.plus_minus) AS max_plus_minus MATCH (t)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus = max_plus_minus RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, s.plus_minus ORDER BY t.team_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN t.team_name AS team_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count WHERE injury_count > 1 RETURN p.full_name, injury_count
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 AND s.plus_minus > 2 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN AVG(p.salary) AS average_salary
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, AVG(p.salary) AS avg_salary RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[r:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date
MATCH (g:GAME) WITH AVG(g.attendance) AS avg_attendance MATCH (g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > avg_attendance RETURN g.game_date, g.attendance
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 RETURN p.full_name, COUNT(g) AS games_count

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS game_count, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE game_count > 10 AND avg_time_on_ice > 20 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER) RETURN p.position, AVG(p.height) AS average_height, AVG(p.weight) AS average_weight
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name

MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.position IS NOT NULL WITH p.position AS position, COUNT(p) AS player_count, AVG(p.height) AS avg_height, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight WHERE player_count >= 3 RETURN position, avg_height, avg_weight
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(ir:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.end_date >= date() RETURN p.full_name, ir.injury_type
MATCH (p:PLAYER) RETURN p.position, AVG(p.height) AS avg_height, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight ORDER BY avg_height DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p:PLAYER)-[c:COVERED_BY]->(contract:CONTRACT) WHERE contract.salary > 700000 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary WHERE total_salary > 5000000 RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pi:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC), (t:TEAM) WHERE pi.team_id = t.TEAM_id AND s.goals > 0 RETURN p.full_name, g.game_date, t.team_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WITH p.position AS position, COUNT(p) AS player_count, AVG(p.height) AS avg_height, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight WHERE player_count >= 5 RETURN position, avg_height, avg_weight
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD {status: 'Career Threatening'}) RETURN DISTINCT t.team_name, t.city
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN t.team_name, AVG(c.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.assists) AS avg_assists WHERE games_played > 50 AND avg_assists > 2 RETURN p.full_name, avg_assists
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN t.team_name, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 AND s.plus_minus > 3 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, p.position

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH t, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'}) WHERE c.signing_bonus > 50000 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name
MATCH (ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN ra.risk_level AS risk_level, COUNT(ra) AS assessment_count ORDER BY assessment_count DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WHERE c.risk_rating = 'high' AND a.balance > 50000 RETURN c, a
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WHERE c.risk_rating = 'high' WITH avg(a.balance) AS avg_balance MATCH (acc:Account) WHERE acc.balance > avg_balance RETURN acc
MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(c2:Customer) RETURN DISTINCT c2.name
MATCH (c1:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a1:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(c2:Customer) RETURN c1, c2
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) RETURN re
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) RETURN re
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.status = 'active' AND a.balance > 10000 RETURN count(a)
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction) WHERE c.risk_rating = 'high' RETURN count(t) AS total_high_risk_transactions
MATCH (a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WHERE fp.risk_profile = 'low-risk' RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'}) WITH c.onboarding_date AS john_onboarding_date MATCH (cust:Customer) WHERE cust.onboarding_date > john_onboarding_date RETURN cust
MATCH (a:Account {Account_id: 'A000001'})-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN ra

MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(other:Customer) RETURN DISTINCT other.name, a.Account_id, a.account_number, a.account_type, a.balance, a.currency, a.status, a.opening_date, a.last_activity_date
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.name = 'John Moore' AND c.risk_rating = 'high' RETURN c
MATCH (t:Transaction) WHERE t.currency = 'USD' RETURN sum(t.amount) AS total_amount
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.status = 'active' AND a.balance > 10000 RETURN count(a)
MATCH (a:Account)-[o:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) RETURN fp.name AS product_name, COUNT(a) AS account_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WHERE c.onboarding_date >= date('2022-01-01') AND c.onboarding_date <= date('2022-12-31') AND a.status = 'active' RETURN avg(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction) WHERE c.risk_rating = 'high' RETURN count(t) AS total_transactions
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) RETURN fp.name, fp.regulatory_category
MATCH (c:Customer {risk_rating: 'low'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:TransactsWith]-(t:Transaction) RETURN count(t) AS total_transactions
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.status = 'inactive' AND a.balance < 5000 RETURN count(a)
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.opening_date >= date('2023-01-01') AND a.opening_date <= date('2023-12-31') RETURN avg(a.balance) AS average_balance

MATCH (c1:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c1.name AS customer1, c1.risk_rating AS customer1_risk_rating, c2.name AS customer2, c2.risk_rating AS customer2_risk_rating
MATCH (t:Transaction) WHERE t.transaction_type = 'withdrawal' WITH avg(t.amount) AS avg_amount MATCH (t2:Transaction) WHERE t2.amount > avg_amount RETURN t2
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) RETURN a.Account_id, a.account_type

MATCH (c1:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c1.name AS customer1_name, c1.risk_rating AS customer1_risk_rating, c2.name AS customer2_name, c2.risk_rating AS customer2_risk_rating

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i2:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i3:Institution) WHERE i1.Institution_id <> i3.Institution_id RETURN DISTINCT i1.name AS institution1_name, i1.country AS institution1_country, i3.name AS institution2_name, i3.country AS institution2_country

MATCH (c1:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)<-[:HoldsAccount]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c1.name AS customer1_name, c1.risk_rating AS customer1_risk_rating, c2.name AS customer2_name, c2.risk_rating AS customer2_risk_rating

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i2:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i3:Institution) WHERE i1.Institution_id <> i3.Institution_id RETURN DISTINCT i1.name, i1.country, i3.name, i3.country
MATCH (t:Transaction) WHERE t.transaction_type = 'withdrawal' WITH avg(t.amount) AS avg_amount MATCH (t2:Transaction) WHERE t2.amount > avg_amount RETURN t2
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'John Moore'})-[h:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) RETURN a.Account_id, a.account_type
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.kyc_status = 'verified' AND c.risk_rating = 'high' RETURN c ORDER BY c.onboarding_date ASC
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND a.status = 'active' RETURN a ORDER BY a.balance DESC
MATCH (t:Transaction) WHERE t.transaction_type = 'withdrawal' AND t.amount > 500 RETURN t ORDER BY t.timestamp DESC
MATCH (a:Account) WHERE a.status = 'active' AND a.balance > 5000 RETURN count(a)
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WHERE c.kyc_status = 'verified' RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(t) AS total_transactions

MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[con:Contains]->(p:Product) WITH c, pur.channel AS channel, SUM(con.line_total) AS total_spent WHERE channel IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS customer_name, channel, total_spent ORDER BY customer_name, channel

MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH cat, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN cat.name AS category_name, total_sales, average_price

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value, AVG(sup.lead_time) AS avg_lead_time ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value, avg_lead_time

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[r:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (total_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(total_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WHERE s.reliability_score IS NOT NULL RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, s.reliability_score AS reliability_score, p.name AS product_name, AVG(sup.lead_time) AS avg_lead_time ORDER BY s.reliability_score DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' AND op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, op.stock_quantity AS current_stock, op.reorder_threshold AS threshold

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales WHERE order_count > 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_sales ORDER BY total_sales DESC
MATCH (s:Store)<-[:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) RETURN s.name, COUNT(e) AS num_employees, AVG(e.performance_metrics) AS avg_performance_rating
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, sum(o.total_amount) AS total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.start_date < date('2023-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, e.role AS role

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH s, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales RETURN s, total_sales ORDER BY total_sales DESC
MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[:ManagedBy]->(e) RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, (sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, op.stock_quantity AS current_stock, op.shelf_location AS shelf_location

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, p, c, sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity AS supply_value ORDER BY supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, supply_value

MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.location = 'New York' WITH avg(w.performance_rating) AS avg_ny_rating MATCH (e2:Employee)-[w2:WorksAt]->(:Store) WITH avg_ny_rating, avg(w2.performance_rating) AS overall_avg RETURN avg_ny_rating, overall_avg

MATCH (p:Product)<-[s1:Supplies]-(sup1:Supplier), (p)<-[s2:Supplies]-(sup2:Supplier) WHERE sup1 <> sup2 WITH p, collect(DISTINCT {supplier_name: sup1.name, supply_price: s1.supply_price}) AS supplier_details1, collect(DISTINCT {supplier_name: sup2.name, supply_price: s2.supply_price}) AS supplier_details2 UNWIND supplier_details1 + supplier_details2 AS supplier_info RETURN p.name AS product_name, collect(DISTINCT supplier_info) AS suppliers

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold WITH DISTINCT s MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s) RETURN s.name AS store_name, e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS employee_role

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count
MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.performance_rating > 4.0 AND w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, w.performance_rating

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value WHERE order_count > 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_sales, avg_order_value ORDER BY total_sales DESC
MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT p.channel) AS channels WHERE size(channels) > 1 RETURN c.name, channels

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, count(DISTINCT st) AS store_count WHERE store_count > 1 RETURN s.name, store_count, s.reliability_score ORDER BY store_count DESC
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name = 'Books' RETURN c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN DISTINCT s.name, s.contact_info
MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Clothing' WITH s, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price WHERE avg_price < 50 RETURN s.name, avg_price
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.performance_rating > 4.5 AND w.start_date < date('2022-06-24') RETURN e.name, e.contact_info
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_time_on_ice ORDER BY total_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE injury_types > 1 AND games_played >= 20 RETURN p.full_name, injury_types, games_played

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.penalties) AS total_penalties WHERE games_played > 20 RETURN t.team_name, total_penalties ORDER BY total_penalties DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 RETURN t.team_name, MAX(g.attendance) AS max_attendance
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(con:CONTRACT) WITH c, AVG(con.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE avg_salary > 5000000 RETURN c.full_name, avg_salary

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types, SUM(i.expected_recovery_days) AS total_recovery_days WHERE injury_types >= 2 AND total_recovery_days > 30 RETURN p.full_name, total_recovery_days

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, g, s WHERE s.goals = 0 WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_without_goals MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g2:GAME) WITH p, games_without_goals, COUNT(g2) AS total_games WHERE games_without_goals = total_games RETURN p.full_name, games_without_goals

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH t, p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE games_played >= 20 RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.penalties) AS avg_penalties WHERE games_played > 50 RETURN t.team_name, avg_penalties ORDER BY avg_penalties DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 10 RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, g.game_date
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue AS arena_name, COUNT(g.GAME_id) AS total_games ORDER BY total_games DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE p.shooting_hand IS NOT NULL AND p.position IS NOT NULL RETURN p.shooting_hand, p.position, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 5 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH g, AVG(s.plus_minus) AS avg_plus_minus MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus > avg_plus_minus RETURN p.full_name, g.game_date, s.plus_minus
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.expected_recovery_days ORDER BY i.expected_recovery_days DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary WHERE total_salary > 50000000 RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN p.full_name, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_time_on_ice ORDER BY total_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, SUM(s.penalties) AS total_penalties, COUNT(g) AS games_participated ORDER BY total_penalties DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN p.full_name, total_penalties, games_participated
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH), (t)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'}) RETURN t.team_name, c.full_name, COUNT(g) AS total_games
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 20000 RETURN DISTINCT t.team_name, g.game_date, g.venue
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN t.team_name, COUNT(i) AS total_injuries, AVG(i.expected_recovery_days) AS avg_recovery_time ORDER BY total_injuries DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE (c.end_date IS NULL OR c.end_date > date()) AND pf.contract_start_date <= date('2023-12-31') AND pf.contract_end_date >= date('2023-01-01') RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.assists) AS total_assists WHERE games_played >= 15 RETURN p.full_name, total_assists ORDER BY total_assists DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS players_coached, AVG(s.plus_minus) AS avg_plus_minus WHERE players_coached >= 5 RETURN c.full_name, avg_plus_minus ORDER BY avg_plus_minus DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'})-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN c.full_name, t.team_name, AVG(s.goals) AS avg_goals ORDER BY avg_goals DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH t, p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary WHERE injury_count > 2 RETURN t.team_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS injured_players, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH l, COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS team_count, variance(c.salary) AS salary_variance WHERE team_count > 5 RETURN l.league_name, salary_variance ORDER BY salary_variance DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (l:LEAGUE)<-[ci:COMPETES_IN]-(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH l, t, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary MATCH (t)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH l, t, total_salary, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE games_played >= 30 RETURN l.league_name, t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH c, t, variance(s.plus_minus) AS plus_minus_variance WHERE plus_minus_variance > 5 RETURN c.full_name, plus_minus_variance ORDER BY plus_minus_variance DESC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[s:Speaks]->(l:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN c, l
MATCH (c:CITY)-[h:HasEthnicGroup]->(e:ETHNICITY) RETURN count(e) AS ethnic_group_count, avg(h.percentage) AS average_percentage
MATCH (l:LAKE) WHERE l.max_depth > 100 AND l.area > 500 RETURN l ORDER BY l.max_depth DESC
MATCH (r1:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA)<-[:FlowsInto]-(r2:RIVER) WHERE r1.river_id <> r2.river_id RETURN r1.name AS river1_name, r2.name AS river2_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(co:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(g:GOVERNMENT_TYPE) WHERE c.population >= 1000000 AND c.population <= 5000000 AND g.name = 'Republic' RETURN c ORDER BY c.population ASC
MATCH (p1:PROVINCE)-[:Contains]->(b1:BOUNDARY), (p2:PROVINCE)-[:Contains]->(b2:BOUNDARY) WHERE b1.type = b2.type AND p1.province_id <> p2.province_id RETURN DISTINCT p1.name, p2.name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) WHERE r.length > 1000 RETURN r ORDER BY r.length DESC
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN country.name AS country_name, count(c) AS city_count, sum(c.population) AS total_population ORDER BY country_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) WHERE o.name = 'Pacific Ocean' RETURN r.name
MATCH (p:PROVINCE) WHERE p.population < 1000000 AND p.area > 10000 RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.area ASC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN c.name AS country, AVG(f.area) AS average_forest_area, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (c:CITY) WHERE c.area > 500 AND c.latitude >= 40 AND c.latitude <= 50 RETURN c ORDER BY c.longitude ASC
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) WITH o, count(r) AS tributary_count RETURN o.name AS ocean_name, tributary_count ORDER BY tributary_count DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)<-[:HasMountain]-(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(c:CONTINENT) WHERE c.area > 10000000 RETURN m
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' RETURN DISTINCT s
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product) RETURN p

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(o.stock_quantity) AS total_stock, AVG(o.reorder_threshold) AS avg_reorder_threshold ORDER BY total_stock DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_stock, avg_reorder_threshold
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS average_supply_price
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c
MATCH (c:Customer {email: 'gatkinson@example.com'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[cont:Contains]->(p:Product) RETURN o.Order_id, o.date, o.total_amount, o.status, p.Product_id, p.name, cont.quantity
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.phone = '8119060961' RETURN c

MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p1:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c2.name

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store)<-[:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) RETURN DISTINCT e.name
MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) RETURN DISTINCT c2.name
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) RETURN s.name AS store_name, COUNT(e) AS employee_count ORDER BY employee_count DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (c:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[r:Contains]-(o:Order) RETURN c.name AS category, SUM(r.quantity) AS total_quantity, SUM(r.line_total) AS total_sales ORDER BY total_sales DESC
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.registration_date < date('2023-01-01') AND c.loyalty_tier = 'Silver' RETURN c ORDER BY c.registration_date ASC
MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' RETURN avg(p.price) AS avg_price
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.registration_date < date('2024-01-01') AND c.loyalty_tier = 'Bronze' RETURN c ORDER BY c.registration_date ASC

MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p1:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c2.name
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) RETURN c.loyalty_tier, count(o) AS total_orders, avg(o.total_amount) AS average_order_amount
MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' WITH avg(p.price) AS avg_price MATCH (p2:Product) WHERE p2.price > avg_price RETURN p2

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, MAX(o.total_amount) AS max_order_total WHERE c.loyalty_tier = 'Silver' WITH MAX(max_order_total) AS silver_max_total MATCH (c2:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o2:Order) WITH c2, o2, silver_max_total WHERE o2.total_amount > silver_max_total RETURN DISTINCT c2
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name = 'Electronics' RETURN c, o
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WHERE c.loyalty_tier = 'Gold' RETURN DISTINCT s
MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Clothing' RETURN e, s, p, c
MATCH (s:Supplier {name: 'TechGlobal Inc.'})-[:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH avg(p.price) AS avg_price MATCH (p2:Product) WHERE p2.price > avg_price RETURN p2
