MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH DISTINCT cat MATCH (otherC:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(otherO:Order)-[:Contains]->(otherP:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat) WHERE otherC.name <> 'Samantha Taylor' RETURN DISTINCT otherC.name AS customer_name, cat.name AS category_name

MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p1:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c2.name AS customer_name, cat.name AS category_name
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN cat.name AS category, COUNT(p) AS product_count
MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' RETURN AVG(p.price) AS average_price

MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, p.description AS product_description
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'Approved' AND d.DateOfBirth < date('1990-01-01') RETURN SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity

MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Completed' AND db.CollectionDate > datetime('2022-01-01T00:00:00') RETURN AVG(db.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity
MATCH (mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial), (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp) WHERE bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN mp.Type AS ProcedureType, h.Name AS HospitalName
MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'AB-' RETURN DISTINCT d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor {HealthStatus: 'Healthy'}) RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, h.Location AS HospitalLocation
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, comp.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'Approved' AND d.DateOfBirth > date('1980-01-01') RETURN SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rcv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, c.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantityDonated
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r) WHERE r.HealthCondition = 'Critical' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' AND r.RequiredQuantity > 10 RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Date AS ProcedureDate
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.CollectionDate < bm.ExpirationDate RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate
MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' AND bm.Status = 'Unsafe' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS QuarantinedBatchCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCount WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, d.DateOfBirth AS DateOfBirth, DonationCount ORDER BY DonationCount DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCount WHERE DonationCount > 10 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rcv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r) WITH r, COUNT(bm) AS CompatibleCount RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, CompatibleCount ORDER BY CompatibleCount DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WITH c.DonorBloodType AS DonorBloodType, c.RecipientBloodType AS RecipientBloodType, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgQuantity RETURN DonorBloodType, RecipientBloodType, AvgQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Successful'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, MIN(perf.Date) AS EarliestProcedureDate, MAX(perf.Date) AS LatestProcedureDate

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' AND r.HealthCondition = 'Critical' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.Quantity > 50 AND bm.ExpirationDate > datetime() RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate, db.Quantity AS BatchQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[don:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND don.Quantity > 10 RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, don.DonationDate AS DonationDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Reserved' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(DISTINCT mp) AS DistinctProcedureCount ORDER BY DistinctProcedureCount DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, SUM(r.RequiredQuantity) AS TotalQuantityUsed RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, TotalQuantityUsed ORDER BY TotalQuantityUsed DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[don:Donates]-(d:Donor) WITH r, COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DonorCount, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalReceivedQuantity WHERE DonorCount > 1 RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, DonorCount, TotalReceivedQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.ExpirationDate > datetime() RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, bm.Type AS MaterialType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS Outcome

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Receives]-(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND bm.Type = 'Platelets' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus, perf.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome, perf.Date AS ProcedureDate

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor)-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement) WHERE rr.ComplianceStatus = 'Compliant' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, d.HealthStatus AS DonorHealthStatus

MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, bm.CollectionDate AS CollectionDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate, d.Name AS DonorName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) WHERE p.Outcome = 'Successful' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS SuccessfulProcedures, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus ORDER BY SuccessfulProcedures DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS ExpiredDonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity WHERE ExpiredDonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, ExpiredDonationCount, AverageQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount, AVG(r.RequiredQuantity) AS AvgRequiredQuantity WHERE ProcedureCount > 10 RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, ProcedureCount, AvgRequiredQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH r, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Successful'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Plasma' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS SuccessfulProceduresCount ORDER BY SuccessfulProceduresCount DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS DonorCount

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r) WITH r, COUNT(bm) AS CompatibleMaterialCount RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.BloodType AS BloodType, CompatibleMaterialCount

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, bm.Type AS MaterialType, d.HealthStatus AS HealthStatus, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, HealthStatus, MaterialType, TotalQuantity ORDER BY DonorName, MaterialType

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[comp:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB-'}) RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName, comp.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS QuarantinedBatchCount MATCH (d)-[:Donates]->(bm2:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Requires]-(mp:MedicalProcedure)<-[:Performs]-(h:Hospital) WHERE h.AccreditationStatus = 'Provisionally Accredited' WITH d, QuarantinedBatchCount, COUNT(DISTINCT mp) AS ProvisionallyAccreditedProcedures RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, QuarantinedBatchCount, ProvisionallyAccreditedProcedures

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O-' AND d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' WITH d, COUNT(bm) AS DonationCountToONegative RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, DonationCountToONegative, d.HealthStatus AS HealthStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Healthy' AND bm.Type = 'Plasma' WITH d, COUNT(don) AS DonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgQuantity WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AvgQuantity AS AverageDonationQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' AND bm.Type = 'Plasma' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate, db.Quantity AS BatchQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB+'}) WITH d MATCH (d)-[:Donates]->(bm2:BiologicalMaterial)-[:Receives]->(r2:Recipient {HealthCondition: 'Critical'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS UniqueDonorCount

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH h, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS Outcome, SUM(req.RequiredQuantity) AS TotalRequiredQuantity RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, ProcedureType, Outcome, TotalRequiredQuantity ORDER BY HospitalName, ProcedureType

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE bm.Type = 'Plasma' AND r.Allergies IS NOT NULL RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, r.Name AS RecipientName, r.Allergies AS RecipientAllergies
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[recv:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, SUM(recv.Quantity) AS TotalQuantityReceived ORDER BY TotalQuantityReceived DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() AND bm.Status = 'Available' RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, bm.CollectionDate AS CollectionDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate

MATCH (bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH bm, COUNT(db) AS BatchCount, MAX(bm.ExpirationDate) AS LatestExpiration RETURN bm.Type AS MaterialType, BatchCount, LatestExpiration ORDER BY BatchCount DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE perf.Outcome = 'Successful' AND bm.Status = 'Expired' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ExpiredMaterialProcedureCount
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE TotalQuantity > 100 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN DISTINCT h.Name AS HospitalName, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, h.AccreditationStatus AS AccreditationStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, SUM(bm.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 3 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AVG(TotalQuantity) AS AverageQuantityPerBatch
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) WHERE mp.Outcome = 'Successful' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, p.Date AS ProcedureDate ORDER BY p.Date DESC

MATCH (db:DonationBatch)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]-(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' WITH db, SUM(btb.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity RETURN db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Quarantined' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, db.CollectionDate AS BatchCollectionDate

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(don) AS DonationCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgDonationQuantity WHERE DonationCount > 5 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, AvgDonationQuantity

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH h, AVG(db.Quantity) AS AvgBatchQuantity, COUNT(mp) AS TotalProcedures RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, AvgBatchQuantity, TotalProcedures

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT bm.Type) AS DistinctMaterialTypes, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE DistinctMaterialTypes >= 2 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, DistinctMaterialTypes, TotalQuantity ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[p:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[r:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[btb:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Processed' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, p.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor) WHERE d.HealthStatus = 'Minor Condition' RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure {Outcome: 'Failed'})-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Platelets' AND bm.ExpirationDate < datetime() RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Status = 'Expired' RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ExpiredMaterialProcedures, MIN(mp.Date) AS EarliestProcedureDate, MAX(mp.Date) AS LatestProcedureDate

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AvgDonationQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 2 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, BatchCount, AvgDonationQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount, SUM(don.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity WHERE BatchCount >= 3 RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, TotalQuantity

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) WHERE bm.Type <> r.BloodType RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, r.BloodType AS RecipientBloodType

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, SUM(rec.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity, COUNT(DISTINCT db) AS BatchCount ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[c:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient) RETURN d.BloodType AS DonorBloodType, c.CompatibilityStatus AS CompatibilityStatus, AVG(don.Quantity) AS AverageQuantity ORDER BY DonorBloodType, CompatibilityStatus
MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:CompatibleWith]->(r:Recipient {BloodType: 'AB+'}) RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, r.Name AS RecipientName

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch {BatchStatus: 'Quarantined'}) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, db.DonationBatch_id AS BatchID, req.RequiredQuantity AS RequiredQuantity

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[rec:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.ExpirationDate < rec.ReceiptDate RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, bm.Type AS MaterialType, rec.ReceiptDate AS ReceiptDate, bm.ExpirationDate AS ExpirationDate

MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor)-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, bm.Type AS MaterialType, rr.ComplianceStatus AS DonorComplianceStatus

MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)-[:BelongsToBatch]->(db:DonationBatch), (mp:MedicalProcedure)-[req:Requires]->(bm), (h:Hospital)-[perf:Performs]->(mp) WHERE h.Location = 'Whitneyville' RETURN d.Name AS DonorName, mp.Type AS ProcedureType, perf.Outcome AS ProcedureOutcome

MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:Receives]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial)<-[:Donates]-(d:Donor {HealthStatus: 'Healthy'})-[:CompliesWith]->(rr:RegulatoryRequirement {ComplianceStatus: 'Compliant'}) RETURN r.Name AS RecipientName, r.HealthCondition AS HealthCondition, d.ConsentStatus AS DonorConsentStatus

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN c.full_name, i.injury_type, i.status, i.injury_date

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.status, i.injury_date, t.team_name

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.jersey_number > 10 AND pf.salary < 700000 RETURN p.full_name, pf.salary ORDER BY pf.salary DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, pf.salary AS player_salary, t MATCH (p2:PLAYER)-[pf2:PLAYS_FOR]->(t2:TEAM) WHERE t2.TEAM_id = t.TEAM_id WITH t, AVG(pf2.salary) AS avg_salary MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.salary > avg_salary RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name

MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(m:Movie) WITH g, count(m) AS movieCount MATCH (gc:Genre {name: 'Comedy'})<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(mc:Movie) WITH g, movieCount, count(mc) AS comedyCount WHERE movieCount > comedyCount RETURN g.name as genre
MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.year = 2020 RETURN a, m
MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Inception'})<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Actor) RETURN count(a) AS actorCount

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH) WITH t, MAX(c.experience_years) AS max_experience WHERE max_experience <= 10 RETURN t.team_name, max_experience
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WITH t, AVG(p.jersey_number) AS avg_salary RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, t, pf.salary AS player_salary, t.division AS division MATCH (p)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH division, p, player_salary, COUNT(g) AS games_played WHERE games_played >= 50 RETURN division, AVG(player_salary) AS avg_salary
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[r:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 5 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, g, s WHERE s.goals > 0 WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_with_goals MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g2:GAME) WITH p, games_with_goals, COUNT(g2) AS total_games WHERE games_with_goals = total_games RETURN p.full_name, games_with_goals

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 10 AND avg_time_on_ice > 20 RETURN p.full_name, avg_time_on_ice
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE g.attendance > 18000 AND s.goals > 2 RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name, g.game_date
MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM) WHERE t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN c.full_name, c.experience_years, t.team_name ORDER BY c.experience_years DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {venue: 'Staples Center'}) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_type) AS injury_types WHERE injury_types > 1 RETURN p.full_name, injury_types

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pa:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME), (p)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, t, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_salary WHERE games_played >= 50 RETURN t.team_name, avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WITH t, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary RETURN t.team_name, total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(s.time_on_ice) AS total_toi WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN p.full_name, total_toi ORDER BY total_toi DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)-[:COMPETES_IN]->(l:LEAGUE) WHERE l.league_name = 'National Hockey League' RETURN c.full_name, c.experience_years ORDER BY c.experience_years DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH g, SUM(s.goals) AS total_goals WHERE total_goals > 10 RETURN g.game_date, g.venue, total_goals ORDER BY total_goals DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) WHERE t.conference = 'Western' RETURN t.team_name, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight ORDER BY avg_weight DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[cb:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE cb.contract_date >= i.injury_date AND (i.status = 'Active' OR i.status = 'Reported') RETURN p.full_name, SUM(c.salary) AS total_salary_during_injury

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) WITH p, COUNT(i) AS injury_count WHERE injury_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH p, injury_count, COUNT(g) AS games_count WHERE games_count >= 15 RETURN p.full_name, injury_count
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus > 3 RETURN p.full_name, g.game_date, s.plus_minus ORDER BY s.plus_minus DESC
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)-[:COMPETES_IN]->(l:LEAGUE) RETURN c.full_name, COUNT(DISTINCT l) AS leagues_coached_in ORDER BY leagues_coached_in DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.start_date > date('2020-01-01') RETURN t.team_name, AVG(c.salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN t.team_name, variance(s.plus_minus) AS performance_variance ORDER BY performance_variance DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME {game_status: 'Completed'})-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.goals > 4 RETURN c.full_name, COUNT(g) AS games_count

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) WITH t, p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, pf.salary AS salary WHERE games_played >= 10 RETURN t.team_name, AVG(salary) AS average_salary ORDER BY average_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, MAX(s.goals) AS max_goals_in_single_game ORDER BY max_goals_in_single_game DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN t.team_name, SUM(pf.salary) AS total_salary ORDER BY total_salary DESC

MATCH (t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH t, p, MAX(s.plus_minus) AS max_plus_minus MATCH (t)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WHERE s.plus_minus = max_plus_minus RETURN t.team_name, p.full_name, s.plus_minus ORDER BY t.team_name

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pp:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS games_played, AVG(s.time_on_ice) AS avg_time_on_ice WHERE games_played >= 20 MATCH (p)-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN p.full_name, t.team_name, avg_time_on_ice ORDER BY avg_time_on_ice DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER) RETURN c.full_name, AVG(pf.salary) AS avg_player_salary ORDER BY avg_player_salary DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME)-[r:RECORDS]->(s:STATISTIC) WITH p, COUNT(g) AS total_games, SUM(CASE WHEN s.goals > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS games_with_goals WHERE games_with_goals > total_games * 0.5 RETURN p.full_name, total_games, games_with_goals
MATCH (g:GAME) RETURN g.venue, COUNT(g) AS games_played, SUM(g.attendance) AS total_attendance ORDER BY total_attendance DESC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}) WITH c MATCH (city:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(c) RETURN SUM(city.population) AS total_population
MATCH (p:PROVINCE)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (p)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN p.name AS province_name, d.name AS desert_name, f.name AS forest_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS source_mountain, s.name AS destination_sea
MATCH (lake:LAKE)-[:AdjacentTo]->(river:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(:OCEAN {name: 'Atlantic Ocean'}) RETURN lake.name AS lake_name, river.name AS river_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:DISTRICT), (c)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY) RETURN c.name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[s:Speaks]->(l:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 80 WITH c MATCH (f:FOREST)-[:HasForest]->(c) RETURN AVG(f.area) AS average_forest_area
MATCH (i:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN i.name AS island_name, i.area AS island_area, s.name AS sea_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT) RETURN DISTINCT province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION {name: 'European Union'}) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c1:COUNTRY), (c)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY), (c)-[:HasGovernment]->(g:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}) WHERE c1 <> c2 RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, r.length AS river_length, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(d:DISTRICT), (c)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(m:MUNICIPALITY) RETURN c.name AS city_name, d.name AS district_name, m.name AS municipality_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(cont:CONTINENT {name: 'Europe'}) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (c)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN c.name AS country_name, d.name AS desert_name, f.name AS forest_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (f:FOREST)-[:HasForest]->(p:PROVINCE) WHERE f.area > 1000 WITH p MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(d:DISTRICT)-[:LocatedIn]->(p) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN), (c)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) RETURN c.name AS country_name, m.name AS mountain_name, d.name AS desert_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 70 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, COUNT(c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:ContainsCity]->(city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province), (province)-[:HasLake]->(lake:LAKE) RETURN province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name, lake.name AS lake_name

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}), (country)-[e:HasEthnicGroup]->(ethnicity:ETHNICITY) RETURN ethnicity.name AS ethnicity_name, e.percentage AS population_percentage
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name, province.name AS province_name

MATCH (lang:LANGUAGE)<-[s:Speaks]-(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(cont:CONTINENT {name: 'Asia'}) RETURN lang.name AS language_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage ORDER BY speaker_percentage DESC

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WITH country, AVG(city.population) AS avg_population RETURN country.name AS country_name, avg_population

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(:COUNTRY) WITH country MATCH (country)<-[:LocatedIn]-(province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN country.name AS country_name, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE c.population > 5000000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, COUNT(c) AS city_count
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY), (c1)-[:HasLake]->(l:LAKE)-[:DrainsTo]->(r:RIVER) RETURN DISTINCT c1.name AS country_name, c2.name AS bordering_country, l.name AS lake_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(gov:GOVERNMENT_TYPE) RETURN gov.name AS government_type, AVG(city.population) AS average_city_population
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area WHERE total_forest_area > 500000 RETURN c.name AS country_name, total_forest_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(municipality:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, district.name AS district_name, municipality.name AS municipality_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, COUNT(c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER) WHERE province.population < 1000000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, SUM(r.length) AS total_river_length
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (country)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN country.name AS country_name, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS deserts, collect(DISTINCT f.name) AS forests
MATCH (s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN s.name AS sea_name, o.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Monarchy'}) RETURN AVG(city.population) AS average_population, collect(city.name) AS city_names
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) WITH c, SUM(d.area) AS desert_area MATCH (c)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, desert_area, SUM(f.area) AS forest_area RETURN c.name AS country_name, desert_area, forest_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WITH city MATCH (city)-[s:Speaks]->(language:LANGUAGE) RETURN language.name AS language_name, AVG(s.percentage) AS average_percentage

MATCH (p:PROVINCE)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (p)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN) WHERE m.height > 3000 RETURN p.name AS province_name, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS deserts, collect(DISTINCT m.name) AS mountains

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY) WITH c, collect(neighbor.name) AS neighbors WHERE size(neighbors) >= 3 UNWIND neighbors AS neighbor_name RETURN c.name AS country_name, collect(DISTINCT neighbor_name) AS neighboring_countries
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY) WHERE c1.population > 30000000 RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighbor_count
MATCH (l:LAKE)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name, o.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage
MATCH (c:CONTINENT) WHERE c.area > 10000000 WITH c MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(c) RETURN country.name AS country_name, c.name AS continent_name
MATCH (i:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN i.name AS island_name, s.name AS sea_name, o.name AS ocean_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, count(DISTINCT c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count ORDER BY country_count DESC

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name, province.name AS province_name, district.name AS district_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE) WITH tz, avg(city.population) AS avg_population WHERE avg_population > 1000000 RETURN tz.utc_offset AS time_zone, avg_population ORDER BY avg_population DESC

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY) WHERE city.population > 1000000 WITH c, COUNT(city) AS city_count MATCH (c)<-[:Crosses]-(r:RIVER) WHERE r.length > 1000 WITH c, city_count, COUNT(r) AS river_count WHERE river_count > 0 RETURN c.name AS country_name, city_count, river_count

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, SUM(f.area) AS forest_area MATCH (c)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) WITH c, forest_area, SUM(d.area) AS desert_area WHERE forest_area > desert_area RETURN c.name AS country_name, forest_area, desert_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT)-[:LocatedIn]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, district.name AS district_name, province.name AS province_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(continent:CONTINENT) WHERE continent.area > 10000000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, region.name AS region_name, continent.name AS continent_name
MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(sea:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(ocean:OCEAN) WHERE island.area > 1000 RETURN island.name AS island_name, sea.name AS sea_name, ocean.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(forest:FOREST), (province)-[:HasDesert]->(desert:DESERT) WITH province, SUM(forest.area) AS total_forest_area, SUM(desert.area) AS total_desert_area RETURN province.name AS province_name, total_forest_area, total_desert_area

MATCH (region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(country:COUNTRY), (region)<-[:PartOf]-(province:PROVINCE) WITH region, SUM(country.population) AS total_country_population, SUM(province.population) AS total_province_population RETURN region.name AS region_name, total_country_population, total_province_population

MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(:CONTINENT {name: 'Europe'}) RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighboring_european_countries_count
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY) WITH c1, COUNT(c2) AS neighbor_count WHERE neighbor_count > 3 RETURN c1.name AS country_name, neighbor_count
MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN), (province)-[:HasForest]->(:FOREST), (province)-[:HasLake]->(:LAKE) RETURN mountain.name AS mountain_name, province.name AS province_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}), (country)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN) RETURN country.name AS country_name, AVG(mountain.height) AS average_height
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY) WHERE city.population > 1000000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, COUNT(city) AS city_count, AVG(city.population) AS average_population
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}), (country)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) RETURN lang.name AS language_name, AVG(s.percentage) AS average_percentage
MATCH (l:LAKE)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN l.name AS lake_name, r.name AS river_name, r.length AS river_length, o.name AS ocean_name
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE {utc_offset: '+00:00'}) WHERE city.population > 2000000 RETURN DISTINCT country.name AS country_name

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(forest:FOREST) WITH country, SUM(forest.area) AS total_forest_area WHERE total_forest_area > 500000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:HasClimate]->(cz:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WHERE city.population > 1000000 WITH country, COUNT(city) AS city_count RETURN country.name AS country_name, city_count

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY) WITH country, COUNT(neighbor) AS border_count WHERE border_count > 3 MATCH (country)<-[:PartOf]-(territory:TERRITORY) WITH country, COUNT(territory) AS territory_count WHERE territory_count > 0 RETURN country.name AS country_name, territory_count

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:ContainsCity]->(city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province), (province)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN) WHERE mountain.height > 2000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name, mountain.name AS mountain_name

MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(c1), (c1)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighboring_countries_count

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(country) RETURN DISTINCT city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST), (province)-[:HasLake]->(:LAKE) WITH province, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area RETURN province.name AS province_name, total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE {utc_offset: '+00:00'}) RETURN c.name AS country_name, city.name AS city_name

MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(ocean:OCEAN) WITH ocean, AVG(island.area) AS avg_area MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(ocean) WHERE island.area > avg_area RETURN island.name AS island_name, ocean.name AS ocean_name, island.area AS island_area
MATCH (mountain:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(river:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(lake:LAKE) RETURN river.name AS river_name, mountain.name AS mountain_name, lake.name AS lake_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(continent:CONTINENT {name: 'Africa'}) WITH province, COUNT(DISTINCT neighbor) AS neighbor_count WHERE neighbor_count >= 2 RETURN province.name AS province_name, neighbor_count
MATCH (c:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product) RETURN p

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store)<-[:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) RETURN DISTINCT e.name

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(o.stock_quantity) AS total_stock, AVG(o.reorder_threshold) AS avg_reorder_threshold ORDER BY total_stock DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_stock, avg_reorder_threshold
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS average_supply_price
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.phone = '8119060961' RETURN c

MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p1:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c2.name
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' RETURN DISTINCT s
MATCH (c:Customer {email: 'gatkinson@example.com'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[cont:Contains]->(p:Product) RETURN o.Order_id, o.date, o.total_amount, o.status, p.Product_id, p.name, cont.quantity
MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) RETURN DISTINCT c2.name
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c
MATCH (c:Customer) WHERE c.email = 'gatkinson@example.com' RETURN c

MATCH (c1:Customer {name: 'Samantha Taylor'})-[:Purchases]->(o1:Order)-[:Contains]->(p1:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p2:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o2:Order)<-[:Purchases]-(c2:Customer) WHERE c1.Customer_id <> c2.Customer_id RETURN DISTINCT c2.name AS customer_name, cat.name AS category_name

MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WITH e, AVG(w.performance_rating) AS avg_rating RETURN e.name, e.store_assignment, e.role, avg_rating ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, collect({supplier: sup.name, price: s.supply_price}) AS supplies, MAX(s.supply_price) - MIN(s.supply_price) AS price_diff WHERE size(supplies) > 1 RETURN p.name, supplies, price_diff

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE store_count >= 3 RETURN c.name, total_spent, store_count ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, c, SUM(p.price * o.stock_quantity) AS total_value RETURN c.name AS category, s.name AS store, total_value ORDER BY c.name, total_value DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[r:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH c, SUM(r.line_total) AS total_spent, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS distinct_products RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, distinct_products ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store {location: 'Donnaburgh'}) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 5 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3
