MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(u:User) RETURN g.name AS genre, AVG(r.score) AS averageScore ORDER BY averageScore DESC
MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m) RETURN u.username, m.title, r.timestamp

MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(u:User) WHERE r.score >= 9 RETURN pc.name AS productionCompany, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie), (u)-[r:RATED]->(m) WHERE w.watchDuration > 150 AND r.score >= 7 RETURN u.username, m.title, w.watchDuration

MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH a, m, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE avgRating >= 9 WITH a, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount RETURN a.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH pc, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount WHERE genreCount > 3 RETURN pc.name, genreCount
MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WHERE w.watchDuration > 120 RETURN u.username AS username, m.title AS movieTitle, w.watchDuration AS watchDuration ORDER BY watchDuration DESC
MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Action'}) RETURN a.name AS actor, COUNT(m) AS actionMovieCount ORDER BY actionMovieCount DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH m, m.year AS releaseYear, COUNT(r) AS ratingCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE ratingCount >= 3 RETURN releaseYear, avgRating ORDER BY releaseYear

MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount MATCH (allGenres:Genre) WITH u, genreCount, COUNT(allGenres) AS totalGenres WHERE genreCount = totalGenres RETURN u.username, genreCount
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE r.score >= 8 WITH a, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount RETURN a.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) RETURN g.name, AVG(w.watchDuration) AS avgWatchDuration ORDER BY avgWatchDuration DESC
MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN d.name, genreCount
MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) RETURN u.username AS username, SUM(w.watchDuration) / 60.0 AS totalWatchDurationInHours ORDER BY totalWatchDurationInHours DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, m, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE avgRating > 8.5 WITH d, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount RETURN d.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH a, COLLECT(DISTINCT g.name) AS genres WHERE SIZE(genres) >= 5 RETURN a.name, genres
MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2015 WITH g, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating RETURN g.name AS genre, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g1:Genre {name: 'Action'}) WITH a, COUNT(m1) AS actionCount MATCH (a)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g2:Genre {name: 'Sci-Fi'}) WITH a, actionCount, COUNT(m2) AS sciFiCount WHERE actionCount > 0 AND sciFiCount > 0 RETURN a.name AS actor, actionCount, sciFiCount

MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount MATCH (g:Genre) WITH u, genreCount, COUNT(g) AS totalGenres WHERE genreCount = totalGenres RETURN u.username AS username, genreCount
MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) RETURN pc.name AS company, AVG(r.score) AS averageRating ORDER BY averageRating DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score = 10 RETURN u.username AS username, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC

MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2010 RETURN pc.name AS productionCompany, AVG(w.watchDuration) AS avgWatchDuration ORDER BY avgWatchDuration DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH a, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 5 RETURN a.name, genreCount
MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score = 10 WITH u, COUNT(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount >= 3 RETURN u.username, movieCount
MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(:User) WHERE m.year >= 2015 AND m.year <= 2020 RETURN m.title AS movieTitle, COUNT(r) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (g:Genre)<-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2010 RETURN g.name AS genre, AVG(w.watchDuration) AS averageWatchDuration ORDER BY averageWatchDuration DESC
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN a.name AS actorName, COLLECT(DISTINCT g.name) AS genres ORDER BY actorName

MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WITH pc, AVG(w.watchDuration) AS avgWatchDuration RETURN pc.name AS companyName, avgWatchDuration ORDER BY avgWatchDuration DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN d.name AS directorName, genreCount ORDER BY genreCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) RETURN pc.name AS companyName, AVG(r.score) AS averageRating ORDER BY averageRating ASC

MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(u) WITH u, SUM(w.watchDuration) AS totalWatchDuration, AVG(r.score) AS averageRating WHERE totalWatchDuration > 10000 AND averageRating > 7 RETURN u.username AS username, totalWatchDuration, averageRating
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH a, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating RETURN a.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE r.score = 10 WITH u, COUNT(m) AS watchedHighRatedMovies RETURN u.username, watchedHighRatedMovies ORDER BY watchedHighRatedMovies DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2010 RETURN d.name AS director, AVG(r.score) AS averageRating ORDER BY averageRating DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, SUM(w.watchDuration) AS totalWatchDuration WHERE totalWatchDuration > 10000 MATCH (u)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m2:Movie) WITH u, totalWatchDuration, COUNT(r) AS reviewCount WHERE reviewCount >= 3 RETURN u.username AS username, totalWatchDuration
MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, COUNT(r) AS ratingCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE ratingCount >= 10 RETURN u.username AS username, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH d, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount, COLLECT(DISTINCT g.name) AS genres WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN d.name AS director, genreCount, genres
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED {score: 10}]-(u:User) RETURN a.name AS actor, m.title AS movieTitle, r.timestamp AS ratingTimestamp

MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WITH pc, AVG(w.watchDuration) AS avgWatchDuration RETURN pc.name AS companyName, avgWatchDuration ORDER BY avgWatchDuration DESC
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = 'Action' RETURN a.name AS actorName, COUNT(m) AS actionMovieCount ORDER BY actionMovieCount DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Director) WHERE d.birthYear < 1960 WITH pc, COUNT(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount >= 3 RETURN pc.name AS productionCompany, movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC
MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:REVIEWED]-(u:User) WHERE m.year >= 2000 AND m.year <= 2010 RETURN m.title AS movieTitle, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH a, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount RETURN a.name, genreCount ORDER BY genreCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (pc:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Director) WHERE d.birthYear < 1980 RETURN pc.name, COUNT(m) AS movieCount

MATCH (d:Director {name: 'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH m MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m) WITH u, COUNT(m) AS watchedCount MATCH (d:Director {name: 'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, watchedCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies WHERE watchedCount = totalMovies RETURN u.username, watchedCount

MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, m, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE avgRating >= 7 WITH d, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount RETURN d.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (u:User)-[:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN u.username AS username, COUNT(m) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, COUNT(m) AS movieCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE movieCount >= 5 RETURN d.name AS directorName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC
MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2000 WITH d, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating RETURN d.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount MATCH (u)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score >= 9 WITH u, genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN u.username, genreCount

MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WHERE m.year >= 1990 AND m.year <= 2010 WITH a, SUM(w.watchDuration) AS totalWatchDuration RETURN a.name, totalWatchDuration ORDER BY totalWatchDuration DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, supplier_count ORDER BY supplier_count DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c.loyalty_tier AS tier, COUNT(c) AS customer_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(o) AS total_orders WHERE customer_count > 10 RETURN tier, avg_order_value, total_orders ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(s.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_inventory_value

MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold WITH DISTINCT e, s RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, COLLECT(DISTINCT cat.name) AS categories WHERE total_spent > 5000 AND NOT 'Electronics' IN categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH o, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count, o.payment_method AS payment_method WHERE category_count >= 3 WITH payment_method, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value RETURN payment_method, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, SUM(s.supply_price * s.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT st) AS store_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, categories_purchased RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, categories_purchased ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH p, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue RETURN p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.category AS category, total_quantity_sold, total_revenue ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE store_count >= 5 AND total_spent > 5000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC
MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, store_count ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH c MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name <> 'Books' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH c, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price RETURN c.name AS category_name, avg_price ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, categories_purchased

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH sup, SUM(s.supply_price * s.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value, p, c ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, total_supply_value

MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product) WITH c, pur.channel AS channel, SUM(p.price * pur.quantity) AS total_spent WHERE channel IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS customer_name, channel, total_spent ORDER BY c.name, channel
MATCH (p:Product)<-[s:Supplies]-(sup:Supplier) WITH p, COLLECT(sup.name) AS suppliers WHERE SIZE(suppliers) > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, suppliers

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, SUM(o.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_inventory_value, category_count ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spending, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, total_spending, category_count ORDER BY total_spending DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.capacity > 300 AND w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name, w.start_date AS start_date

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold WITH s, COUNT(p) AS understocked_product_count, SUM(p.price * op.stock_quantity) AS total_understocked_value RETURN s.name AS store_name, understocked_product_count, total_understocked_value

MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH cat, p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count = 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat) WITH cat, COUNT(p) AS exclusive_product_count RETURN cat.name AS category_name, exclusive_product_count

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS threshold
MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN c.name AS category_name, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY average_price DESC

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, s, AVG(p.price) AS avg_product_price WHERE avg_product_price > 50 MATCH (sup)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS product_count, AVG(sp.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, MIN(op.stock_quantity) AS min_stock WHERE min_stock >= 1 MATCH (s)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_products

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name CONTAINS 'Electronics' WITH s, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, s.reliability_score AS reliability_score, s.contract_terms AS contract_terms, avg_supply_price ORDER BY avg_supply_price DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS reorder_threshold
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[s:Speaks]->(l:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN c, l
MATCH (c:CITY)-[h:HasEthnicGroup]->(e:ETHNICITY) RETURN count(e) AS ethnic_group_count, avg(h.percentage) AS average_percentage
MATCH (l:LAKE) WHERE l.max_depth > 100 AND l.area > 500 RETURN l ORDER BY l.max_depth DESC
MATCH (r1:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA)<-[:FlowsInto]-(r2:RIVER) WHERE r1.river_id <> r2.river_id RETURN r1.name AS river1_name, r2.name AS river2_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(co:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(g:GOVERNMENT_TYPE) WHERE c.population >= 1000000 AND c.population <= 5000000 AND g.name = 'Republic' RETURN c ORDER BY c.population ASC
MATCH (p1:PROVINCE)-[:Contains]->(b1:BOUNDARY), (p2:PROVINCE)-[:Contains]->(b2:BOUNDARY) WHERE b1.type = b2.type AND p1.province_id <> p2.province_id RETURN DISTINCT p1.name, p2.name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) WHERE r.length > 1000 RETURN r ORDER BY r.length DESC
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN country.name AS country_name, count(c) AS city_count, sum(c.population) AS total_population ORDER BY country_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) WHERE o.name = 'Pacific Ocean' RETURN r.name
MATCH (p:PROVINCE) WHERE p.population < 1000000 AND p.area > 10000 RETURN p.name ORDER BY p.area ASC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN c.name AS country, AVG(f.area) AS average_forest_area, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (c:CITY) WHERE c.area > 500 AND c.latitude >= 40 AND c.latitude <= 50 RETURN c ORDER BY c.longitude ASC
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) WITH o, count(r) AS tributary_count RETURN o.name AS ocean_name, tributary_count ORDER BY tributary_count DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)<-[:HasMountain]-(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(c:CONTINENT) WHERE c.area > 10000000 RETURN m
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}) WITH c MATCH (city:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(c) RETURN SUM(city.population) AS total_population
MATCH (p:PROVINCE)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (p)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN p.name AS province_name, d.name AS desert_name, f.name AS forest_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS source_mountain, s.name AS destination_sea
MATCH (lake:LAKE)-[:AdjacentTo]->(river:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(:OCEAN {name: 'Atlantic Ocean'}) RETURN lake.name AS lake_name, river.name AS river_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:DISTRICT), (c)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY) RETURN c.name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[s:Speaks]->(l:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 80 WITH c MATCH (f:FOREST)-[:HasForest]->(c) RETURN AVG(f.area) AS average_forest_area
MATCH (i:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN i.name AS island_name, i.area AS island_area, s.name AS sea_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT) RETURN DISTINCT province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION {name: 'European Union'}) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c1:COUNTRY), (c)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY), (c)-[:HasGovernment]->(g:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}) WHERE c1 <> c2 RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, r.length AS river_length, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(d:DISTRICT), (c)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(m:MUNICIPALITY) RETURN c.name AS city_name, d.name AS district_name, m.name AS municipality_name
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(cont:CONTINENT {name: 'Europe'}) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (c)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN c.name AS country_name, d.name AS desert_name, f.name AS forest_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (f:FOREST)-[:HasForest]->(p:PROVINCE) WHERE f.area > 1000 WITH p MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(d:DISTRICT)-[:LocatedIn]->(p) RETURN SUM(c.population) AS total_population
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN), (c)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) RETURN c.name AS country_name, m.name AS mountain_name, d.name AS desert_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 70 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, COUNT(c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:ContainsCity]->(city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province), (province)-[:HasLake]->(lake:LAKE) RETURN province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name, lake.name AS lake_name

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}), (country)-[e:HasEthnicGroup]->(ethnicity:ETHNICITY) RETURN ethnicity.name AS ethnicity_name, e.percentage AS population_percentage
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name, province.name AS province_name

MATCH (lang:LANGUAGE)<-[s:Speaks]-(p:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(r:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(cont:CONTINENT {name: 'Asia'}) RETURN lang.name AS language_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage ORDER BY speaker_percentage DESC

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WITH country, AVG(city.population) AS avg_population RETURN country.name AS country_name, avg_population

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(:COUNTRY) WITH country MATCH (country)<-[:LocatedIn]-(province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN country.name AS country_name, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area
MATCH (c:CITY)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE c.population > 5000000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, COUNT(c) AS city_count
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY), (c1)-[:HasLake]->(l:LAKE)-[:DrainsTo]->(r:RIVER) RETURN DISTINCT c1.name AS country_name, c2.name AS bordering_country, l.name AS lake_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(gov:GOVERNMENT_TYPE) RETURN gov.name AS government_type, AVG(city.population) AS average_city_population
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area WHERE total_forest_area > 500000 RETURN c.name AS country_name, total_forest_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(municipality:MUNICIPALITY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, district.name AS district_name, municipality.name AS municipality_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, COUNT(c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY) WHERE country.population > 50000000 RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER) WHERE province.population < 1000000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, SUM(r.length) AS total_river_length
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (country)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) RETURN country.name AS country_name, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS deserts, collect(DISTINCT f.name) AS forests
MATCH (s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN s.name AS sea_name, o.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Monarchy'}) RETURN AVG(city.population) AS average_population, collect(city.name) AS city_names
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(l:LAKE) RETURN m.name AS mountain_name, r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) WITH c, SUM(d.area) AS desert_area MATCH (c)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, desert_area, SUM(f.area) AS forest_area RETURN c.name AS country_name, desert_area, forest_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WITH city MATCH (city)-[s:Speaks]->(language:LANGUAGE) RETURN language.name AS language_name, AVG(s.percentage) AS average_percentage

MATCH (p:PROVINCE)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT), (p)-[:HasMountain]->(m:MOUNTAIN) WHERE m.height > 3000 RETURN p.name AS province_name, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS deserts, collect(DISTINCT m.name) AS mountains

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY) WITH c, collect(neighbor.name) AS neighbors WHERE size(neighbors) >= 3 UNWIND neighbors AS neighbor_name RETURN c.name AS country_name, collect(DISTINCT neighbor_name) AS neighboring_countries
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY) WHERE c1.population > 30000000 RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighbor_count
MATCH (l:LAKE)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN r.name AS river_name, l.name AS lake_name, o.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(), (city)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) WHERE s.percentage > 50 RETURN lang.name AS language_name, city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, s.percentage AS speaker_percentage
MATCH (c:CONTINENT) WHERE c.area > 10000000 WITH c MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(c) RETURN country.name AS country_name, c.name AS continent_name
MATCH (i:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(s:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN i.name AS island_name, s.name AS sea_name, o.name AS ocean_name
MATCH (r:RIVER)-[:Crosses]->(c:COUNTRY) WITH r, count(DISTINCT c) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 1 RETURN r.name AS river_name, country_count ORDER BY country_count DESC

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT) RETURN city.name AS city_name, country.name AS country_name, province.name AS province_name, district.name AS district_name

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE) WITH tz, avg(city.population) AS avg_population WHERE avg_population > 1000000 RETURN tz.utc_offset AS time_zone, avg_population ORDER BY avg_population DESC

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY) WHERE city.population > 1000000 WITH c, COUNT(city) AS city_count MATCH (c)<-[:Crosses]-(r:RIVER) WHERE r.length > 1000 WITH c, city_count, COUNT(r) AS river_count WHERE river_count > 0 RETURN c.name AS country_name, city_count, river_count

MATCH (c:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST) WITH c, SUM(f.area) AS forest_area MATCH (c)-[:HasDesert]->(d:DESERT) WITH c, forest_area, SUM(d.area) AS desert_area WHERE forest_area > desert_area RETURN c.name AS country_name, forest_area, desert_area

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:AdministrativeCenter]->(district:DISTRICT)-[:LocatedIn]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(:PROVINCE) RETURN city.name AS city_name, district.name AS district_name, province.name AS province_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(continent:CONTINENT) WHERE continent.area > 10000000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, region.name AS region_name, continent.name AS continent_name
MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(sea:SEA)-[:AdjacentTo]->(ocean:OCEAN) WHERE island.area > 1000 RETURN island.name AS island_name, sea.name AS sea_name, ocean.name AS ocean_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(forest:FOREST), (province)-[:HasDesert]->(desert:DESERT) WITH province, SUM(forest.area) AS total_forest_area, SUM(desert.area) AS total_desert_area RETURN province.name AS province_name, total_forest_area, total_desert_area

MATCH (region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(country:COUNTRY), (region)<-[:PartOf]-(province:PROVINCE) WITH region, SUM(country.population) AS total_country_population, SUM(province.population) AS total_province_population RETURN region.name AS region_name, total_country_population, total_province_population

MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(:CONTINENT {name: 'Europe'}) RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighboring_european_countries_count
MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY) WITH c1, COUNT(c2) AS neighbor_count WHERE neighbor_count > 3 RETURN c1.name AS country_name, neighbor_count
MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN), (province)-[:HasForest]->(:FOREST), (province)-[:HasLake]->(:LAKE) RETURN mountain.name AS mountain_name, province.name AS province_name
MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE), (city)-[:CapitalOf]->(country:COUNTRY) RETURN city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}), (country)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN) RETURN country.name AS country_name, AVG(mountain.height) AS average_height
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY) WHERE city.population > 1000000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, COUNT(city) AS city_count, AVG(city.population) AS average_population
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasGovernment]->(:GOVERNMENT_TYPE {name: 'Republic'}), (country)-[s:Speaks]->(lang:LANGUAGE) RETURN lang.name AS language_name, AVG(s.percentage) AS average_percentage
MATCH (l:LAKE)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:MouthOf]->(o:OCEAN) RETURN l.name AS lake_name, r.name AS river_name, r.length AS river_length, o.name AS ocean_name
MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE {utc_offset: '+00:00'}) WHERE city.population > 2000000 RETURN DISTINCT country.name AS country_name

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:HasForest]->(forest:FOREST) WITH country, SUM(forest.area) AS total_forest_area WHERE total_forest_area > 500000 RETURN country.name AS country_name, total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:HasClimate]->(cz:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) WHERE city.population > 1000000 WITH country, COUNT(city) AS city_count RETURN country.name AS country_name, city_count

MATCH (country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY) WITH country, COUNT(neighbor) AS border_count WHERE border_count > 3 MATCH (country)<-[:PartOf]-(territory:TERRITORY) WITH country, COUNT(territory) AS territory_count WHERE territory_count > 0 RETURN country.name AS country_name, territory_count

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:ContainsCity]->(city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province), (province)-[:HasMountain]->(mountain:MOUNTAIN) WHERE mountain.height > 2000 RETURN province.name AS province_name, city.name AS city_name, mountain.name AS mountain_name

MATCH (c1:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(c2:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(c1), (c1)-[:HasClimate]->(:CLIMATE_ZONE {name: 'Tropical'}) RETURN c1.name AS country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT c2) AS neighboring_countries_count

MATCH (city:CITY)-[:CapitalOf]->(province:PROVINCE)-[:LocatedIn]->(country:COUNTRY)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:COUNTRY)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)<-[:PartOf]-(country) RETURN DISTINCT city.name AS city_name, province.name AS province_name, country.name AS country_name
MATCH (m:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(r:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(s:SEA) RETURN r.name AS river_name, m.name AS mountain_name, s.name AS sea_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:HasForest]->(f:FOREST), (province)-[:HasLake]->(:LAKE) WITH province, SUM(f.area) AS total_forest_area RETURN province.name AS province_name, total_forest_area ORDER BY total_forest_area DESC
MATCH (c:COUNTRY)<-[:LocatedIn]-(city:CITY)-[:Observes]->(tz:TIME_ZONE {utc_offset: '+00:00'}) RETURN c.name AS country_name, city.name AS city_name

MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(ocean:OCEAN) WITH ocean, AVG(island.area) AS avg_area MATCH (island:ISLAND)-[:IslandIn]->(ocean) WHERE island.area > avg_area RETURN island.name AS island_name, ocean.name AS ocean_name, island.area AS island_area
MATCH (mountain:MOUNTAIN)-[:SourceOf]->(river:RIVER)-[:FlowsInto]->(lake:LAKE) RETURN river.name AS river_name, mountain.name AS mountain_name, lake.name AS lake_name

MATCH (province:PROVINCE)-[:SharesBorderWith]->(neighbor:PROVINCE)-[:PartOf]->(region:REGION)-[:PartOf]->(continent:CONTINENT {name: 'Africa'}) WITH province, COUNT(DISTINCT neighbor) AS neighbor_count WHERE neighbor_count >= 2 RETURN province.name AS province_name, neighbor_count
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution1, i2.name AS institution2, i1.country
MATCH (c:Customer {kyc_status: 'verified'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {jurisdiction: 'EU'}) RETURN DISTINCT c.name, c.Customer_id
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN DISTINCT i1.name, i1.country
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.status = 'completed' AND a.balance > 5000 RETURN c.Customer_id, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount
MATCH (t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) RETURN t.amount AS transaction_amount, t.currency AS transaction_currency, ra.assessment_date AS risk_assessment_timestamp
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) RETURN c.name, count(ra) AS high_risk_assessments
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, count(i2) AS relationship_count WHERE relationship_count > 1 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, relationship_count
MATCH (a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) WHERE re.last_reported_date > date('2023-01-01') RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance
MATCH (c:Customer {customer_type: 'corporate'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct {risk_profile: 'high'}) RETURN AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) WHERE a.balance > 10000 RETURN DISTINCT c.name, c.Customer_id, a.Account_id, a.balance

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WITH c, COUNT(ra) AS risk_count, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_transaction_amount WHERE risk_count > 2 RETURN c.name, c.Customer_id, risk_count, avg_transaction_amount

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution), (i1)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i3:Institution) WHERE i2.Institution_id <> i3.Institution_id AND i1.country <> i2.country AND i1.country <> i3.country RETURN DISTINCT i1.name, i1.country

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity {jurisdiction: 'EU'})<-[:ReportsTo]-(a:Account) WITH re, count(DISTINCT a) AS account_count MATCH (re)<-[:ReportsTo]-(t:Transaction) WITH re, account_count, count(DISTINCT t) AS transaction_count WHERE account_count > 10 RETURN re, account_count, transaction_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, currencies

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2.country) AS country_count WHERE country_count > 3 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, country_count ORDER BY country_count DESC
MATCH (t:Transaction)-[:RecordedIn]->(al:AuditLog) WHERE t.status = 'failed' RETURN al.details AS audit_details, t.amount AS transaction_amount

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity)<-[:ReportsTo]-(n) WHERE n:Account OR n:Transaction WITH re, COUNT(n) AS total_reports WHERE total_reports > 100 RETURN re.name AS regulatory_entity_name, total_reports ORDER BY total_reports DESC
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i2:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]-(i3:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country OR i1.country = i3.country RETURN DISTINCT i1

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WHERE ra.risk_level = 'high' RETURN c.name AS customer_name, a.Account_id AS account_id, ra.assessment_date AS assessment_date
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, count(ra) AS risk_assessment_count ORDER BY risk_assessment_count DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.currency = 'USD' AND t.status = 'completed' RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN i1.name AS institution1_name, i2.name AS institution2_name, c.relationship_start AS relationship_start_date
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WITH i1, count(i2) AS relationship_count WHERE relationship_count > 1 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, relationship_count
MATCH (a:Account)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) WHERE re.compliance_status = 'non_compliant' RETURN sum(a.balance) AS total_balance

MATCH (a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WITH a, COUNT(fp) AS product_count WHERE product_count > 1 MATCH (a)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) RETURN a.account_number, product_count, collect(fp.name) AS product_names
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WHERE fp.risk_profile = 'high' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (i:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(:Institution) WHERE c.relationship_status = 'active' RETURN i.name, COUNT(c) AS correspondent_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND a.currency = 'USD' AND t.status = 'failed' RETURN c.name, a.account_number, t.reference_number

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE size(currencies) > 1 UNWIND currencies AS currency MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a2:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a2.currency = currency RETURN c, currencies

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WHERE sup.lead_time > 10 AND s.reliability_score < 0.7 WITH s, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price ORDER BY product_count DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:Order) WHERE p.channel = 'Online' WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WITH e, AVG(w.performance_rating) AS avg_rating RETURN e.name, e.store_assignment, e.role, avg_rating ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT pur.channel) AS channels WHERE SIZE(channels) = 4 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.email AS customer_email

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE store_count >= 3 RETURN c.name, total_spent, store_count ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 5 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, c, SUM(p.price * o.stock_quantity) AS total_value RETURN c.name AS category, s.name AS store, total_value ORDER BY c.name, total_value DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[r:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH c, SUM(r.line_total) AS total_spent, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS distinct_products RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, distinct_products ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, collect({supplier: sup.name, price: s.supply_price}) AS supplies, MAX(s.supply_price) - MIN(s.supply_price) AS price_diff WHERE size(supplies) > 1 RETURN p.name, supplies, price_diff

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store {location: 'Donnaburgh'}) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count WHERE store_count > 1 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, store_count
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product) RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY average_price DESC
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.capacity > 200 AND w.start_date > date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, e.role AS role, w.start_date AS start_date

MATCH (o:Order)-[c:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH p, cat, SUM(c.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, total_quantity_sold ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:Order) WHERE p.channel <> 'online' WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE total_spent > 1000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name
MATCH (s:Store)<-[:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) WHERE e.performance_metrics > '4.5' RETURN s.name AS store_name, COLLECT(e.name) AS high_performers

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[r:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name CONTAINS 'Electronics' WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS electronics_categories_purchased MATCH (total_electronics_cats:Category) WHERE total_electronics_cats.name CONTAINS 'Electronics' WITH c, electronics_categories_purchased, COUNT(total_electronics_cats) AS total_electronics_categories WHERE electronics_categories_purchased = total_electronics_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(p.price * op.stock_quantity) AS total_inventory_value RETURN s.name AS store_name, s.location AS store_location, total_inventory_value ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_total MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o2:Order) WHERE o2.total_amount > avg_order_total WITH c, COUNT(o2) AS high_value_orders RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.email AS customer_email, high_value_orders

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, category_count ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3
MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < 10 WITH s, COUNT(p) AS low_stock_count, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price RETURN s.name AS store_name, low_stock_count, avg_price

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(op.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_inventory_value ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(o.stock_quantity * p.price) AS inventory_value ORDER BY inventory_value DESC LIMIT 3 MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s) RETURN s.name AS store_name, e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, inventory_value

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count WHERE order_count > 5 MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_total RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, avg_order_total ORDER BY avg_order_total DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 3 AND total_spent > 2000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (t:Transaction)<-[:TransactsWith]-(a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) RETURN t.reference_number AS transaction_reference, re.name AS regulatory_entity_name

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS account_currencies WHERE size(account_currencies) > 1 MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WITH c, account_currencies, collect(DISTINCT t.currency) AS transaction_currencies WHERE size(transaction_currencies) >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, account_currencies

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'critical'}) RETURN fp.name AS product_name, AVG(fp.current_balance_impact) AS average_balance_impact
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, COUNT(i2) AS international_relationships_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies, count(ra) AS risk_count WHERE size(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name, currencies, risk_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {transaction_type: 'withdrawal'}) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 500 RETURN c.name, a.account_number, t.amount

MATCH (t:Transaction)<-[:TransactsWith]-(a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity {compliance_domain: 'banking'}) RETURN t.reference_number AS transaction_reference, count(re) AS report_count
MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'}) WHERE a.balance > 100000 RETURN fp.name, COUNT(t) AS failed_transaction_count

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE t.amount > 10000 AND t.status = 'completed' RETURN fp.name AS product_name, fp.product_type AS product_type, COUNT(t) AS high_value_transaction_count
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2.country) AS country_count RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, country_count
MATCH (a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'medium'})-[:AssessesRisk]->(fp:FinancialProduct {product_type: 'investment'}) RETURN SUM(a.balance) AS total_balance

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 1000 RETURN fp.name AS product_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS account_count, COUNT(DISTINCT t) AS transaction_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra1:RiskAssessment), (c)-[:AssessesRisk]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra2:RiskAssessment) WITH c, AVG(ra1.flags_raised) AS avg_flags_from_accounts, AVG(ra2.flags_raised) AS avg_flags_from_transactions RETURN c.name, (avg_flags_from_accounts + avg_flags_from_transactions) / 2 AS average_flags_raised

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(DISTINCT i2) AS international_correspondent_count WHERE international_correspondent_count > 2 RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, international_correspondent_count
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, count(i2) AS international_correspondent_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 10000 AND t.amount > 5000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, a.account_number AS account_number, t.reference_number AS transaction_reference
MATCH (i1:Institution)-[c:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) RETURN i1.name AS institution1, i2.name AS institution2, c.relationship_start AS relationship_start ORDER BY c.relationship_start
MATCH (i:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(other:Institution) WITH i, COLLECT(DISTINCT other.country) AS countries WHERE SIZE(countries) > 2 RETURN i.name AS institution_name, countries

MATCH (a:Account {account_type: 'savings'})-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'})-[:RecordedIn]->(al:AuditLog) RETURN al.details AS audit_log_details, a.account_number AS account_number
MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'critical'}) RETURN fp.name, AVG(ra.flags_raised) AS average_flags_raised

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies, count(DISTINCT a) AS account_count WHERE account_count > 1 MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a2:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) WITH c, currencies, count(DISTINCT re) AS counterparty_count WHERE counterparty_count >= 3 RETURN c.name, currencies
MATCH (a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(:RegulatoryEntity) RETURN a.account_number, a.currency, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount, AVG(t.amount) AS average_amount

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct {risk_profile: 'high'}), (a)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'})-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) RETURN c.name, sum(t.amount) AS total_failed_amount

MATCH (fp:FinancialProduct)<-[:OffersProduct]-(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction) WHERE a.balance > 50000 WITH fp, a, COLLECT(DISTINCT t.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) >= 2 RETURN fp.name AS product_name, fp.product_type AS product_type, COUNT(DISTINCT currencies) AS distinct_currency_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account) WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT a.currency) AS currencies WHERE SIZE(currencies) > 1 RETURN c.name, currencies
MATCH (c:Customer {risk_rating: 'medium'})-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:OffersProduct]->(fp:FinancialProduct) WHERE a.balance > 5000 RETURN fp.name, AVG(a.balance) AS average_balance

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country = i2.country WITH i1, COUNT(i2) AS same_country_relationships RETURN i1.name AS institution_name, same_country_relationships

MATCH (i1:Institution)-[:CorrespondentWith]->(i2:Institution) WHERE i1.country <> i2.country WITH i1, count(i2) AS cross_border_relationships RETURN i1.name, cross_border_relationships ORDER BY cross_border_relationships DESC

MATCH (re:RegulatoryEntity)<-[:ReportsTo]-(t:Transaction {status: 'completed'}) WITH re, count(t) AS completed_transactions MATCH (re)<-[:ReportsTo]-(a:Account {status: 'active'}) WITH re, completed_transactions, count(a) AS active_accounts RETURN re.name AS regulatory_entity_name, completed_transactions, active_accounts

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'high'}) WITH c, COUNT(ra) AS high_risk_count RETURN c.name, high_risk_count
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, sum(o.total_amount) AS total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales WHERE order_count > 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_sales ORDER BY total_sales DESC

MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH cat, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN cat.name AS category_name, total_sales, average_price

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value, AVG(sup.lead_time) AS avg_lead_time ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value, avg_lead_time

MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[con:Contains]->(p:Product) WITH c, pur.channel AS channel, SUM(con.line_total) AS total_spent WHERE channel IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS customer_name, channel, total_spent ORDER BY customer_name, channel
MATCH (s:Store)<-[:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) RETURN s.name, COUNT(e) AS num_employees, AVG(e.performance_metrics) AS avg_performance_rating
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.start_date < date('2023-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, e.role AS role

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[r:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (total_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(total_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WHERE s.reliability_score IS NOT NULL RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, s.reliability_score AS reliability_score, p.name AS product_name, AVG(sup.lead_time) AS avg_lead_time ORDER BY s.reliability_score DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Electronics' AND op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, op.stock_quantity AS current_stock, op.reorder_threshold AS threshold
MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[:ManagedBy]->(e) RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, op.stock_quantity AS current_stock, op.shelf_location AS shelf_location

MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.location = 'New York' WITH avg(w.performance_rating) AS avg_ny_rating MATCH (e2:Employee)-[w2:WorksAt]->(:Store) WITH avg_ny_rating, avg(w2.performance_rating) AS overall_avg RETURN avg_ny_rating, overall_avg

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, (sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (p:Product)<-[s1:Supplies]-(sup1:Supplier), (p)<-[s2:Supplies]-(sup2:Supplier) WHERE sup1 <> sup2 WITH p, collect(DISTINCT {supplier_name: sup1.name, supply_price: s1.supply_price}) AS supplier_details1, collect(DISTINCT {supplier_name: sup2.name, supply_price: s2.supply_price}) AS supplier_details2 UNWIND supplier_details1 + supplier_details2 AS supplier_info RETURN p.name AS product_name, collect(DISTINCT supplier_info) AS suppliers

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, p, c, sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity AS supply_value ORDER BY supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, supply_value
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) RETURN c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer {loyalty_tier: 'Gold'})-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH s, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales RETURN s, total_sales ORDER BY total_sales DESC

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold WITH DISTINCT s MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s) RETURN s.name AS store_name, e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS employee_role

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value WHERE order_count > 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_sales, avg_order_value ORDER BY total_sales DESC

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, count(DISTINCT st) AS store_count WHERE store_count > 1 RETURN s.name, store_count, s.reliability_score ORDER BY store_count DESC
MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.performance_rating > 4.0 AND w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, w.performance_rating
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name = 'Books' RETURN c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent
MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold RETURN DISTINCT s.name, s.contact_info
MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, collect(DISTINCT p.channel) AS channels WHERE size(channels) > 1 RETURN c.name, channels
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.performance_rating > 4.5 AND w.start_date < date('2022-06-24') RETURN e.name, e.contact_info
MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Clothing' WITH s, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price WHERE avg_price < 50 RETURN s.name, avg_price

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[cont:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(cont.loyalty_points_earned) AS total_loyalty_points, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, total_loyalty_points, category_count ORDER BY total_loyalty_points DESC LIMIT 3

MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count, COUNT(p) AS total_products, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price WHERE category_count = 20 RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_products, avg_price

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.email AS email, category_count
MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT s.location) AS city_count WHERE city_count >= 5 RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, city_count

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT st) AS store_count, AVG(s.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, COUNT(sup) AS supplier_count, MIN(sp.supply_price) AS min_price, MAX(sp.supply_price) AS max_price WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count, min_price, max_price

MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WITH s, MAX(w.performance_rating) AS max_rating MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.performance_rating = max_rating RETURN s.name AS store_name, e.name AS employee_name, w.performance_rating AS performance_rating

MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT pur.channel) AS channel_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE channel_count = 3 AND total_spent > 1000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent
MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') AND w.performance_rating > 4.0 RETURN e.name AS employee_name, s.name AS store_name, w.performance_rating

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, categories_purchased

MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count, COUNT(p) AS total_products WHERE category_count > 10 RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_products

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name = 'Furniture' WITH sup, SUM(sp.supply_price * sp.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WITH e, COUNT(s) AS stores_count, AVG(w.performance_rating) AS avg_performance_rating ORDER BY avg_performance_rating DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN e.name AS employee_name, stores_count, avg_performance_rating

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT sup) AS supplier_count, MIN(s.supply_price) AS min_supply_price, MAX(s.supply_price) AS max_supply_price WHERE supplier_count > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, supplier_count, min_supply_price, max_supply_price

MATCH (s:Store)<-[w:WorksAt]-(e:Employee) WHERE w.performance_rating > 4.5 WITH s, COUNT(e) AS high_performers_count, AVG(w.performance_rating) AS avg_high_performer_rating RETURN s.name AS store_name, high_performers_count, avg_high_performer_rating

MATCH (c:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[co:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(co.line_total) AS total_sales_value, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS distinct_products_count ORDER BY total_sales_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name AS category_name, total_sales_value, distinct_products_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS stores_purchased_from MATCH (all_stores:Store) WITH c, stores_purchased_from, COUNT(all_stores) AS total_stores WHERE stores_purchased_from = total_stores MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, stores_purchased_from RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, stores_purchased_from ORDER BY total_spent DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[co:Contains]->(pr:Product) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT o) AS order_count, SUM(co.line_total) AS total_spending, AVG(co.line_total) AS average_order_value RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_spending, average_order_value ORDER BY total_spending DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (c:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price RETURN c.name AS category_name, avg_price ORDER BY avg_price DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, category_count, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE category_count = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count WHERE order_count > 5 MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_amount RETURN c.name AS customer_name, avg_order_amount ORDER BY avg_order_amount DESC

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, category_count, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE category_count = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count
MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price, COUNT(p) AS product_count WHERE product_count > 5 RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, avg_price

MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[cont:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(cont.line_total) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 5 AND total_spent > 1000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent

MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, p, SUM(op.stock_quantity) AS total_stock WHERE total_stock > 1000 RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, total_stock

MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count MATCH (cat:Category) WITH s, category_count, COUNT(cat) AS total_categories WHERE category_count = total_categories RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count

MATCH (o:Order)-[cont:Contains]->(p:Product) WITH p, SUM(cont.quantity * cont.unit_price) AS total_sales, COUNT(o) AS order_count RETURN p.name AS product_name, total_sales, order_count ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price ORDER BY avg_supply_price DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (c:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue, COUNT(p) AS product_count RETURN c.name AS category_name, total_revenue, product_count ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, SUM(p.price * op.stock_quantity) AS total_inventory_value, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_inventory_value, category_count ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 75 AND p.position = 'Center' RETURN p ORDER BY p.jersey_number ASC
MATCH (c:COACH) WHERE c.experience_years > 10 RETURN c.full_name, c.salary ORDER BY c.salary DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER {full_name: 'Kayla Morrison'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH) RETURN DISTINCT c
MATCH (c:COACH) WHERE c.experience_years > 5 AND c.coaching_license IS NOT NULL RETURN c.full_name, c.salary ORDER BY c.salary ASC

MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year < 2000 AND t.conference = 'Western' AND t.team_name STARTS WITH 'A' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year ASC
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 70 AND p.weight < 200 RETURN p ORDER BY p.height DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]->(g:GAME) RETURN p.full_name, COUNT(g) AS games_participated
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year > 1990 AND t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year DESC
MATCH (c:COACH)-[r:COACHES]->(t:TEAM) RETURN t.team_name, AVG(r.salary) AS average_salary
MATCH (p:PLAYER {full_name: 'Elaine Crawford'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN t
MATCH (c:COACH) WHERE c.experience_years > 5 AND c.coaching_license IS NOT NULL RETURN c.full_name, c.salary ORDER BY c.salary ASC
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 75 AND p.position = 'Center' RETURN p ORDER BY p.jersey_number ASC
MATCH (p:PLAYER {full_name: 'Kayla Morrison'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:COACHES]-(c:COACH) RETURN DISTINCT c.full_name, c.role
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year > 1990 AND t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[r:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN t.team_name, count(p) AS player_count
MATCH (p1:PLAYER {full_name: 'Elaine Crawford'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p2:PLAYER) WHERE p1.PLAYER_id <> p2.PLAYER_id RETURN DISTINCT p2.full_name, p2.position
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.status, i.injury_date, i.expected_recovery_days
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.full_name = 'Elaine Crawford' AND p.position = 'Center' RETURN p
MATCH (c:COACH)-[:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN c.full_name, i.injury_type, i.status, i.injury_date
MATCH (p1:PLAYER {full_name: 'Elaine Crawford'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p2:PLAYER) WHERE p1.PLAYER_id <> p2.PLAYER_id RETURN DISTINCT p2.full_name

MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN c.full_name AS coach_name, t.team_name AS team_name, i.injury_type AS injury_type, i.status AS injury_status
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 75 AND p.position = 'Center' RETURN p ORDER BY p.height DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) RETURN p.full_name, i.injury_type, i.status, i.injury_date, t.team_name

MATCH (c:COACH)-[co:COACHES]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[s:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD) RETURN c.full_name AS coach_name, t.team_name AS team_name, i.injury_type AS injury_type, i.status AS injury_status
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year > 1990 AND t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year ASC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE p.jersey_number < 20 AND pf.salary > 500000 RETURN p.full_name, pf.salary ORDER BY pf.salary DESC
MATCH (c:COACH)-[r:COACHES]->(t:TEAM) RETURN c.full_name, t.team_name ORDER BY c.experience_years DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 75 AND p.position = 'Center' RETURN p ORDER BY p.height DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM)-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p:PLAYER)-[:PARTICIPATES_IN]-(g:GAME) WHERE g.attendance > 15000 RETURN DISTINCT t
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.weight > 200 AND p.position = 'Defenseman' RETURN p ORDER BY p.weight DESC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.jersey_number < 20 AND pf.salary > 500000 RETURN p.full_name, pf.salary ORDER BY pf.salary DESC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, pf.salary AS player_salary, t MATCH (p2:PLAYER)-[pf2:PLAYS_FOR]->(t2:TEAM) WHERE t2.TEAM_id = t.TEAM_id WITH t, AVG(pf2.salary) AS avg_team_salary MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.salary > avg_team_salary RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[:SUSTAINS]->(i:INJURY_RECORD), (p)-[:COVERED_BY]->(c:CONTRACT) WHERE c.salary > 500000 RETURN DISTINCT p
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year < 1980 AND t.conference = 'Western' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year ASC
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year > 1990 AND t.conference = 'Eastern' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year ASC
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE p.height > 75 AND pf.salary < 600000 RETURN p.full_name, pf.jersey_number ORDER BY pf.jersey_number ASC
MATCH (p1:PLAYER {full_name: 'Elaine Crawford'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p2:PLAYER) WHERE p1.PLAYER_id <> p2.PLAYER_id RETURN DISTINCT p2.full_name
MATCH (p1:PLAYER {full_name: 'Elaine Crawford'})-[:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM)<-[:PLAYS_FOR]-(p2:PLAYER) RETURN DISTINCT p2.full_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER) WHERE p.height > 70 AND p.weight < 200 RETURN p ORDER BY p.height DESC
MATCH (t:TEAM) WHERE t.founded_year >= 1980 AND t.founded_year <= 2000 AND t.conference = 'Western' RETURN t ORDER BY t.founded_year ASC

MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WITH p, pf.salary AS player_salary, t MATCH (p2:PLAYER)-[pf2:PLAYS_FOR]->(t2:TEAM) WHERE t2.TEAM_id = t.TEAM_id WITH t, AVG(pf2.salary) AS avg_salary MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.salary > avg_salary RETURN DISTINCT p.full_name
MATCH (p:PLAYER)-[pf:PLAYS_FOR]->(t:TEAM) WHERE pf.jersey_number > 10 AND pf.salary < 700000 RETURN p.full_name, pf.salary ORDER BY pf.salary DESC
MATCH (mp:MedicalProcedure) WHERE mp.Type = 'Transplant' AND mp.Date > datetime('2023-01-01 00:00:00') RETURN mp ORDER BY mp.Date DESC
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS ProcedureCount ORDER BY ProcedureCount DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (d:Donor)-[c:CompliesWith]->(r:RegulatoryRequirement) WHERE d.Donor_id = 'D000001' RETURN r
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure) RETURN h.Name AS HospitalName, COUNT(mp) AS NumberOfProcedures ORDER BY NumberOfProcedures DESC
MATCH (db:DonationBatch) RETURN MAX(db.Quantity) AS MaxQuantity, MIN(db.Quantity) AS MinQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'Consented' AND d.DateOfBirth < date('1993-01-01') RETURN d ORDER BY d.DateOfBirth ASC

MATCH (b:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE b.Status = 'Available' AND b.CollectionDate >= datetime('2023-01-01 00:00:00') AND b.CollectionDate < datetime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') RETURN b ORDER BY b.ExpirationDate DESC
MATCH (db:DonationBatch) WHERE db.BatchStatus = 'Available' RETURN sum(db.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[c:CompliesWith]->(r:RegulatoryRequirement) WHERE d.Donor_id = 'D000002' RETURN r
MATCH (r:Recipient) WHERE r.BloodType = 'O+' AND r.HealthCondition = 'Critical' RETURN r ORDER BY r.Name ASC
MATCH (d:Donor)-[c:CompliesWith]->(r:RegulatoryRequirement) WHERE d.Donor_id = 'D000001' RETURN r.Name, c.ComplianceStatus
MATCH (db:DonationBatch) RETURN sum(db.Quantity) AS total_quantity
MATCH (d:Donor) WHERE d.ConsentStatus = 'given' RETURN count(d) AS DonorCount
MATCH (d:Donor {Name: 'Jill Martin'})-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) RETURN bm
MATCH (d:Donor) WHERE d.Donor_id = 'D000001' RETURN d
MATCH (d:Donor)-[:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE d.Name = 'Jill Martin' RETURN bm
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WHERE bm.Type = 'Plasma' RETURN DISTINCT h
MATCH (d:Donor)-[don:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH d, COUNT(don) AS donation_count, AVG(don.Quantity) AS avg_quantity WHERE donation_count > 1 RETURN d.Name, avg_quantity
MATCH (d:Donor)-[donates:Donates]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) RETURN AVG(donates.Quantity) AS average_quantity_per_donor
MATCH (h:Hospital)-[:Performs]->(mp:MedicalProcedure)-[:Requires]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) RETURN DISTINCT h.Name, h.AccreditationStatus
MATCH (r:Recipient)-[:CompatibleWith]->(bm:BiologicalMaterial) WITH DISTINCT r RETURN count(r) AS RecipientCount
MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account {status: 'active'})-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction {status: 'failed'}) RETURN c.name, a.account_number, SUM(t.amount) AS total_failed_amount

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment {risk_level: 'critical'}) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS critical_accounts WHERE critical_accounts >= 2 RETURN c.name, critical_accounts

MATCH (c:Customer)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a:Account)-[:TransactsWith]->(t:Transaction)-[:ReportsTo]->(re:RegulatoryEntity) WITH c, re.jurisdiction AS jurisdiction MATCH (c)-[:HoldsAccount]->(a2:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra:RiskAssessment) WHERE ra.risk_level IN ['medium', 'high'] WITH c, COLLECT(DISTINCT jurisdiction) AS jurisdictions WHERE SIZE(jurisdictions) > 2 RETURN c.name, jurisdictions
